clean_body: Friend, When I was in the White House, America had a President who put our Nation FIRST every single day. For the first time in a long time, power was taken from Washington and given BACK to the American People. Unfortunately, Joe Biden and the rest of the Washington SWAMP are working overtime to undo everything my administration accomplished. Mark my words, America will be put FIRST again, but only with the help of my most loyal supporters. You've always been a trusted ally, Friend, which is why I want to offer you something very exclusive. This is the year we TAKE AMERICA BACK from the Left, soI 've decided to dedicate a wall at my office for a select group of donors who choose to step up at this critical time. I want to give you PRIORITY ACCESS to get your name permanently engraved on theOfficial 2022 Trump Donor Wall. Space is extremely limited. This could be your only chance. I want you to be a part of history with me, Friend. I promise I will never stop fighting to put AMERICA First. I need you to stand with me so that we canSAVE AMERICA. Can I count on you? name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Don't Fall for Democrat Dirty Tricks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heidi for Governor
body:
Democrats are scared of the momentum we are building! They have dropped1.5M in ads to pick their primary opponent. Let's tell them Colorado is NOT for sale.
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-r/) Hello Peter,**Democrats are dumping millions into the governor's race because they are scared to run against me!** Democrats have dropped $1.5M in ads supporting my opponent because they KNOW they can beat him easily this November. [Don't take my word for it, read it here in the Colorado Sun (click here).](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-y/)**While they are doing that, I'm criss-crossing the state, doing everything I can to earn the support and endorsements of hard-working Coloradans.** [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-j/) [(Listen to the interview here)](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-t/) _**Endorsements:**_ Thank you to the [Fort Morgan Times](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-i/) and the [Durango Herald ](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-d/)for endorsing me as the best candidate to vote for in the primary! Earlier this primary, I also earned the endorsement of the [Colorado Springs and Denver Gazette.](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-h/)While I appreciate these hard earned votes of confidence, it is you the every day Coloradan whose endorsement I seek. In fact, today I just visited the last of our beautiful 64 counties in a campaign swing to the Western Slope! [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-k/) [(Read the endorsement here)](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-u/) [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-n/) [(Read the endorsement here)](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-p/) The countdown is on!!!Please get your ballots in. They must in the mail by June 21st. If you plan to drop them off, head to******[GoVoteColorado.gov](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-x/)** to find a drop box or polling place near youThank you for all your support.Let's win this!Heidi [$10](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-m/) [$50](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-c/) [$100](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-q/) [Other](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-a/) [Volunteer](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-f/) Never miss a beat, follow me on social media! [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-z/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-v/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-e/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-s/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qlhuhuy-ttjjilthht-g/) | Heidi for Governor
PO Box 754

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews._djWD7H7Yt5lslw)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I'm sure you've felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There's no doubt in my mind that our nation's citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation's vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That's why I'm sending you this email today. I'd like to hear how the Biden administration's energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://trk.readactnews.) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think-and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration's radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://trk.readactnews.)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxNjMtZjdkODFlZDIwY2NmNGMyNGIyZTVhYjFiNzdhMjEyYjkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/rnpY9pD9rGPWZ9-z97Wg-Q) to unsubscribe.
---

The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. You can get started right now using this secure link: Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe VP, Development | | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Mark Meckler, COS Action
subject: Sign the National Convention of States Petition!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Convention of States Action
body:
I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp5uevseg0l2cogcm31hhi8qfosiaajhcl00uv4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1i6eoj4sjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcp9m6ir66cb66tij2s3jmeqmap36mar7fdbj68rrfcdn63ieaobmmaomepjk61jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8qmcd34mdijfclhcppb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6uegrrpplo8b9l8de7es9nldipo0kc2e23ath6g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1i6eoj4sjh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, [**I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America**.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3aritkmrd8vd5f5liscb1lkj1n1q2742nn5tva8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1i6eoj4sjh2bs) An army of conservative heroes including **_Mark Levin, Ben Shapiro, Sean Hannity,_** and** _Lt. Col. Allen West_** have joined our movement to call for an Article V Convention of States. [**Just click here to add your name to this national petition. And then PLEASE forward this email to every single person you know.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbt3np0o18l0159blb23l6sfr0g8pk1f3j3hoj5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1i6eoj4sjh2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlf887hmc1nns86qnud89v15c0k9u1ipqp3spra8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1i6eoj4sjh2bs)
---
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy. Federal spending has never been higher -- nor has our deficit. And the politicians in Washington won't do anything to save us. _In fact, most of them are part of the problem!_ A Convention of States is our only hope. You see, our Founding Fathers were brilliant men. They left an emergency clause in the Constitution in case the federal government got too big and out-of-control. **Article V of the Constitution allows the states to bypass Congress and the President to call a Convention of States to propose amendments to our Constitution that will rein in the federal government.** Well, conservative leaders all across the country -- along with over **_FIVE MILLION_** grassroots patriots -- believe it is time to invoke Article V and call a Convention of States for the express, _limited_ purpose of imposing fiscal restraints and term limits on Congress and limiting the power, scope, and jurisdiction of the federal government. And I hope you do, too. With the socialists in control in Washington, it's time to take action before it's too late! It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. [**Please sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States right now, and please ask everyone you know to do the same.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaiq4lr341sj4tsnv1jmuas3seau89t8ke70p160_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1i6eoj4sjh2bs) Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. **We have already passed the COS Resolution through the state legislatures in 19 states, including four since the start of this year alone -- bringing us over __HALFWAY__ to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington!** This year alone, the Resolution has passed out of committee in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Iowa, and Kansas -- paving the way for the next round of states to pass! With dozens of states currently considering the COS Resolution, _NOW_ is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. **A Convention of States is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the D.C. Swamp, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government.** The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V Convention of States. [**Simply click here to sign and we’ll deliver it directly to your state legislators, free of charge. This is our best chance to save America from an out-of-control federal government.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt95la2re4qudt6p8unot1111rtr0k19dqu8qc40_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1i6eoj4sjh2bs) Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and the politicians are too invested in its growth. We the people must take control through our state legislatures. [**Please join the fight to call a Convention of States. Sign the petition today, and urge every freedom-loving American to do the same.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmbpbr21pp2rg6bnefdsrbb5rr57h0jtc6cjmoho_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1i6eoj4sjh2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z25o7b8kppg10p620277250rt8aevfcfuck9mscg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1i6eoj4sjh2bs)
---
Thank you, and may God bless America! For America, Mark Meckler President Convention of States Action
---
Paid for by Convention of States Action
---
5850 San Felipe
Suite 580A
Houston, TX 77057
---

name: Ron Johnson
subject: DECISION MADE 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,
Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like _The New York Times_ , _Washington Post_ , and the _Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_ where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me. And that is why today, I am officially announcing my re-election campaign for the Wisconsin Senate seat.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Peter. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can.

And that's why I need your help.

**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60567941:6DQN7Fo4N:m:1:3253819041:ECCDEC16211344FCEE7ED5BF56C76920:r "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5,
$10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and
their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [FIGHT FOR FREEDOM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60567941:6DQN7Fo4N:m:1:3253819041:ECCDEC16211344FCEE7ED5BF56C76920:r "Fight for Freedom")
---

P.S. As the Left's number one target, they want to silence my voice. Liberal media conglomerates, talk shows, and newspapers will be pushing their viewers and readers to support liberal candidates that will work to tear down our institutions and impose their agenda by spreading their false and manipulative message. I really need your help.

---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60567942:6DQN7Fo4N:m:1:3253819041:ECCDEC16211344FCEE7ED5BF56C76920:r "RonJohnsonFooter")
---
| _A personal note from Ron Johnson:_

Thank you for standing strong with me, Peter. While the media tries to smear me, I am not afraid of standing up for the truth. I appreciate you joining me in the battle for Wisconsin against the Radical Democrats.

Recently, CNN ranked my seat #3 most likely to flip. Reports are also saying that even the THREAT of losing my seat could derail plans to take back the Senate. The thought of losing WI is terrifying -- it's just one more step towards destroying Trump's Legacy.

So I need you to step up and stand strong with me. **[Please click here to donate now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60567942:6DQN7Fo4N:m:1:3253819041:ECCDEC16211344FCEE7ED5BF56C76920:r "Please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for being a patriot,

Ron Johnson

name: Leah Cole Allen
subject: Reminder: In the news!
body:
New Boston Post Covers My Race for LG...
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
|
---
| Friends,
Check out this great article in the New Boston Post on my race for Lt. Governor:
[Leah Cole Allen Weighs In On Bid For Lieutenant Governor of Massachusetts - NewBostonPost | NewBostonPost](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G74dJv0kRit0Ld4Qnk8cjQdM9gfwnVdRbl7Aq_xJ6EOV0j162OnV7E5SWnl-kQM910px7Ju7Xbnhu2JbUvEIOJ-DT2eeY0EfEcTMjm2PrbhF6vShUjrnZn31x3aGyZts4qCt_j-6nrjUcqUqotBJAAcD4ypE2fPajOFdZdfw70F33ElSiE9miZtRdv6MKwe61gAomi82J3bPqoMQ-f2wMRAHsY9_wtoxoeDK-MIvOFp71uS6srmLOxKMJXl6J5Yv3uL1wiyOsmk1AR4ZNCqWsw==&c=YHDPEIbopFJKnZGI6G7wZOhbJTEjW7T0Oo4Vgqg_YDIEz8rrNRoVCg==&ch=wb6Rz8cZzjHro0tSyPeXevRYB5GD-QW-B52w125yGdXPHHaBO0lZ3Q==)
"While the pandemic and current political problems the state faces inspired Allen to get back into electoral politics, she says that her experience in the legislature, as well as Diehl's experience, would be an asset in the State House.
"We're familiar with the lawmaking process and how business runs up here," Allen said. "We're also familiar with the power structure that goes on up there. That's why the people of Massachusetts deserve a team in the corner office that will fight for them and not just go along with the status quo; we won't just go along with some of the aggressive policies that will harm the people of Massachusetts."
Please join me at my official campaign kick-off event, on Wednesday, June 15th, with special guest, Attorney Jay MacMahon, candidate for Massachusetts Attorney General:

That's why the people of Massachusetts deserve a team in the corner office that will fight for them and not just go along with the status quo; we won't just go along with some of the aggressive policies that will harm the people of Massachusetts." == | == | I hope you'll join me for my official campaign kick off on Wednesday, June 15th with special guest, Attorney Jay MacMahon, candidate for Massachusetts Attorney General. | | | | | Leah Cole Allen for LG == | | | | | | | | Allen for MA | PO Box 174, 17 Conant Street, Danvers, MA 01923 | | Sent by mailto:info@geoffdiehl.com in collaboration with

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Your endorsement matters to me. ➡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568270:6YZ-7FoNn:m:1:3253819041:672493B3C666CF5AD84613AD1DC09978:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---

---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568271:6YZ-7FoNn:m:1:3253819041:672493B3C666CF5AD84613AD1DC09978:r "Please click here to donate now")**

Sunday, June 12th Edition

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KbPHHhyQlpRILkNvdnQGLmhOsux4knj8U3Cqey0tpvGVgWwi5MDABOwdw1lurBBw43uVLt-H4IT_CdImkpg_ySu4o9kJWIeR4xeFRrYvcDA72fTYw1c0joYKTDfuyET_JYA5slNr46Wkt5nSsfAYdQ==&c=rrxtjKyMv5vcRDRTFewYz31bbDabKUmHxcR6Rs5llGxHx1EdE-J0TA==&ch=Gnu6zn3gLeux-wizRQvk-exCxctS4uhN47K-PjfmST3SQhZt7dCbwg==)

# Weekly Newsletter
---
|
---
June 12, 2022 | Issue XX
---
| |
---
| |
---
Senator Rob Ortt and Mayor of Poughkeepsie Rob Rolison candidate for State Senate at the Palace Diner in Poughkeepsie
---
---
Senator Rob Ortt speaking at a press conference in Onondaga County with Senate candidates Rebecca Shiroff and Julie Abbott.
---
| TAKE BACK NEW YORK TOUR
---
Just this week I was traveling around the state because it's time to TAKE BACK NY.
I joined Senate Candidates Rob Rolison in Poughkeepsie, [Rich David](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KbPHHhyQlpRILkNvdnQGLmhOsux4knj8U3Cqey0tpvGVgWwi5MDABIGtcNTGSnv0LNzRBWBTHnDmW20WgzxFjc3dUmc2Arw7pzZfsWLlcsXSadHA50TYTnbo_De-duq3R6Y_ec3i11GrTEUDe83OymeqvUOFlbJaHa5UAjagVX8=&c=rrxtjKyMv5vcRDRTFewYz31bbDabKUmHxcR6Rs5llGxHx1EdE-J0TA==&ch=Gnu6zn3gLeux-wizRQvk-exCxctS4uhN47K-PjfmST3SQhZt7dCbwg==) in Binghamton, and [Julie Abbott](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KbPHHhyQlpRILkNvdnQGLmhOsux4knj8U3Cqey0tpvGVgWwi5MDABIGtcNTGSnv0D5-jcyKFH8KRSNKoU4NELAvkw_Fg0BLyjRPdbbzKQhJ0fK7GPyA6P30tx3-ObZKyBS5fMWqYsw5KqtUw_CPg6UMtl53AyYyvw1UqGWFIxrjBUJsIeojj3Q==&c=rrxtjKyMv5vcRDRTFewYz31bbDabKUmHxcR6Rs5llGxHx1EdE-J0TA==&ch=Gnu6zn3gLeux-wizRQvk-exCxctS4uhN47K-PjfmST3SQhZt7dCbwg==) & [Rebecca Shiroff](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KbPHHhyQlpRILkNvdnQGLmhOsux4knj8U3Cqey0tpvGVgWwi5MDABIGtcNTGSnv0vz5ESwj4HO75nykBgSepj0WHDpHGI8EviiSjsD62SJsF2SaIJfPCrhtIRHKRz_4XIG5cPdf6Hei3ke0zaVfR7lVfzt43eIacMrpKDJ8o1VI=&c=rrxtjKyMv5vcRDRTFewYz31bbDabKUmHxcR6Rs5llGxHx1EdE-J0TA==&ch=Gnu6zn3gLeux-wizRQvk-exCxctS4uhN47K-PjfmST3SQhZt7dCbwg==) in Onondaga County. We blasted One Party Rule in Albany for failing to take action to make New York more affordable and provide relief for families and businesses who are struggling with record-high inflation and costs of living.
---
---
Binghamton with Senate candidate Rich David and Senator Pam Helming, Chair of SRCC
---
| |
---
| Senate and Assembly Republicans Introduce Amendment to Establish a Recall Process for District Attorneys
---
On Wednesday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt, Assembly Republican Leader Will Barclay, Deputy Republican Leader Andrew Lanza and Assemblyman Michael Tannousis introduced a constitutional amendment ([S.9484](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KbPHHhyQlpRILkNvdnQGLmhOsux4knj8U3Cqey0tpvGVgWwi5MDABIGtcNTGSnv0EyyEqbkNgwryRoLfXK5pZjIZ9s9bfJyxjlhDQLtIY7SD_0SzJ_M5RVnej9mKTSV2JssZSzsetrra49VYUzjoa_UjiwDsBApsfHzNVwRb29VFDQ2Hh31OqPoXAY0ppn1G&c=rrxtjKyMv5vcRDRTFewYz31bbDabKUmHxcR6Rs5llGxHx1EdE-J0TA==&ch=Gnu6zn3gLeux-wizRQvk-exCxctS4uhN47K-PjfmST3SQhZt7dCbwg==)) to establish recall elections for District Attorneys who refuse to enforce the law and champion soft-on-crime policies that are exacerbating a rise in violent crime throughout New York State. [Read the press release here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KbPHHhyQlpRILkNvdnQGLmhOsux4knj8U3Cqey0tpvGVgWwi5MDABIGtcNTGSnv0i3-6wT4OEFKErxUF_8WXbkia8HTgB9LWjvlzwgk9yoxQqSDln01K7LnIioYH1KTm__l_Gbt4TEfn4PwkggfAPKnZfwaJLO7wr5KG-ceguz3UKf_ZxCRGgpMA1dRuKLgLISbWK0CXalNGQ5EHgb_23sDqpBxJ_IbL&c=rrxtjKyMv5vcRDRTFewYz31bbDabKUmHxcR6Rs5llGxHx1EdE-J0TA==&ch=Gnu6zn3gLeux-wizRQvk-exCxctS4uhN47K-PjfmST3SQhZt7dCbwg==)
Earlier this week in California, a successful recall of DA Chesa Boudin has proven that even Californian Democrat voters are dissatisfied with the Left's soft-on-crime policies that are wreaking havoc on our inner cities.
While New York does not have recall elections, Governor Kathy Hochul does have the ability to remove district attorneys who fail to do their jobs.
[Sign my petition to demand Governor Hochul remove DA Bragg, who has emboldened criminals since the FIRST DAY he took office. Add your signature now to help make a safer New York!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KbPHHhyQlpRILkNvdnQGLmhOsux4knj8U3Cqey0tpvGVgWwi5MDABIGtcNTGSnv0Fo8bkJ4S1CE1gx_hHcT7Hk_ThAVR9-zqpmAOOOmQIJj7bi3hqkUlmuHi9Ab2Z4oBShVBc4ROfm1Nk06EcYm_Wmaep6wzBUKBil4ndpLbvyHgN2etg_CIkQTXJ95s5dPVcuprpUWGnLbQkYD4Pk4wpSrFy5Arjgq16BqHm7CtxureQN7D3z0-BQ==&c=rrxtjKyMv5vcRDRTFewYz31bbDabKUmHxcR6Rs5llGxHx1EdE-J0TA==&ch=Gnu6zn3gLeux-wizRQvk-exCxctS4uhN47K-PjfmST3SQhZt7dCbwg==)

| | Statement from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt On Reported Firebombing of Pro-Life Women's Medical Tuesday, June 7, 2022
The overnight firebombing of a pro-life women's medical office in our community is a despicable act of extremism that must be universally condemned. I'm grateful to hear that the injured firefighters are recovering and that CompassCare's employees were not harmed. I'm thankful for the brave firefighters and members of law enforcement who responded quickly to the scene. Whoever committed this atrocity must immediately be brought to justice.
It is extremely disturbing that the state Legislature recently passed a bill specifically targeting pro-life medical offices such as this one. Additionally, it is alarming that the Governor and New York State legislature haven't offered one dime of security or support funds for clinics like those operated by CompassCare, despite just recently providing $10 million for abortion clinic security.

Donald J. Trump

name: Ron Johnson
subject: I am humbly asking for your endorsement, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568320:6Jg57Fo5N:m:1:3317145305:CBF0AD36D8550B68376B8F2A514BB658:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568321:6Jg57Fo5N:m:1:3317145305:CBF0AD36D8550B68376B8F2A514BB658:r "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568321:6Jg57Fo5N:m:1:3317145305:CBF0AD36D8550B68376B8F2A514BB658:r "Please click here to donate now")**

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart. As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win. I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear. In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail. Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win. So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA. | | | "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON" Thank you, Ron Johnson | | | | "RonJon Announcement" | Peter, It's Ron Johnson. I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate. I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster. This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to SAVE AMERICA from the Democrats. "Please click here to donate now"** | | | "SAVE THE SENATE" | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc. PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159 Text RonJon to 47682 for mobile alerts! If you would prefer to donate by mail, please send your contribution to the following address. RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC. PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 1, 2022. For more information . | mailto:unsub-49042382798-echo7-1348CA17F83085201EB7EA972B2EF556@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Tom Pyle, AEA
subject: Sign this petition to end Biden’s war on oil
body:
Within his first week in office, President Biden signed an executive order temporarily suspending new oil and gas leases on fede
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq793mp4i9rog781o5mm1s2ve2s1nmov1jf9rh08_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p32c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shke9qb4o3lcdjjcsj6mep78t5ks6q62tlj6hpn6pjmelrj0tljepgj9c9ichgefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33d5lm1jr5c36e2ob6oj7m2qmash5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv4epmef1tidhgdkedl8sqimeon12n00eliuoig0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p32c5h2bs)
---
Friend, Within his first week in office, President Biden signed an executive order temporarily suspending new oil and gas leases on federal lands — _Now they’ve taken anti-oil to the next level._ Biden’s Interior Department just **_canceled_** a ONE MILLION ACRE OIL LEASE SALE**** in Alaska, along with TWO MORE OIL LEASE SALES in the Gulf of Mexico as Americans face painfully high prices at the pump. **America is experiencing the highest gas prices ever in history. Gas prices have soared by 50% nationwide over the past year. The American Energy Alliance (AEA) has drafted a petition in response to this attack on American energy prices.** [**Please Sign our UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY Petition:**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zepvstq9p58ihc5j7lpk1rtva59a2jan4l04l6g8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p32c5h2bs)
---
[**Sign The Unleash American Energy Petition Now!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpic8pdqfbb0jrhropj25lrkno8ka6iu62g6j3a0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p32c5h2bs)
---
Average gas prices in the U.S. have reached new record-highs thanks to policies enacted by the Biden administration. The national average price of regular gasoline hit a new record of $4.60 on Thursday. Former Trump EPA advisor Steve Milloy said: _"I blame Biden for all lack of production ...**They will find any excuse to not drill**.”_ **The price you are paying at the pump is a direct result of restrictions placed on energy producers. Not allowing them to produce enough energy needed to keep our economy moving has resulted in this skyrocketing of prices for all consumers.** Together, we must send an urgent message to the Biden administration, letting them know we will not stand for this any longer. That is why AEA has drafted this petition to end the gas price crisis. **_AEA is on the frontlines fighting everyday for an abundant, reliable and affordable energy future._**_We are asking for your support now to help bring gas prices down_** _— Please sign the UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY petition today._** [**Tell****Joe Biden how we, the American people, feel about his administration’s direct assault on energy prices by signing our UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY Petition now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbjpejmcojodvkhjhaalclej4fp8tobe95ffo1og_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p32c5h2bs)
---
[**Sign The Unleash American Energy Petition Now!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zim1m0dr1u2ih4hto95m8fbonlbs9ve7pnmvns70_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p32c5h2bs)
---
With your support, we will keep fighting against the politicians and special interests intent on implementing a never-ending list of federal fees, taxes, and barriers to entry that will lead to further continuation of record-high fuel prices. **[Please sign the petition now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlrkbk8mkg12600h4fpvm75jl5na2l53926j5g60_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p32c5h2bs)** Thank You, Tom Pyle
President American Energy Alliance

Friends,

This is Kim Rogers, Executive Director of DASS – in a moment I’m going to ask you to rush just $20 or more towards tonight’s goal . But first, let me tell you why it’s so important!

RUSH $20 OR MORE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-june22?refcode=EM_FR_061222_B1_Kim-Humbly-Asking_30AC&amount=5]

With everything that’s happened in the past few years, it can be hard to keep track of all the extremist threats to our democracy.

But the numbers are clear. 26 Secretary of State offices are up for election this year. And the RSLC – the group backing extremists Republicans like Finchem, Marchant, Karamo, and the rest – raised more than TEN MILLION DOLLARS last year alone!

Your support is the only way we can hit our $25,000 goal. And it’s the only way we come close to beating the Right’s dark money fundraising.

Please, friend – I’m asking you to rush $20 right now and help us hit this goal. The only way we can win is together!

name: Richard W. Walker
subject: You won’t believe what’sbeing taught in medical schools
body:
I am sounding the alarm in the hope you can respond here to help me tackle this growing problem.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8gq9kh33fq2k25na9v21cumtqr8b219h37pberg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6p5gmeqr6pb66aq65c5n68qr1c72maqn9clj6irjbcbncpr62tr1mhhjcd1jmsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8qmcd30mdi60tj3coo71cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z38llile8ld3ej8a6u2ksm76nptvorbskhgr72m8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)

Friend,

I am sounding the alarm in the hope you can respond here to help me tackle this growing problem.

Our medical schools are compromised. If you think indoctrination is bad at universities, wait until you see what they are teaching in medical schools. **I fear it 's only a matter of time before people are seriously hurt by what's being taught and the public loses trust in our medical institutions. **

Other doctors are calling out the red flags too:

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd20d6cjeqp2oe433354gh33todbn3i4ov2gbsuo_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)

_Last point here, but it 's a dangerous one _\- some medical schools are teaching med students, that being unhealthy is actually the fault of an oppressive society and therefore doctors must actively seek to change society by ignoring medical science in favor of social justice.

**Medical schools are now training political activists NOT doctors. **

[_**I am calling on your help to fight back against radical activism in medical schools. Can you chip in $5, $10, $35, or any amount you can generously spare? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq8eilr7bj9ikcj8piqirio4vm5f00460np69l00_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)

_My name is Richard W. Walker, Executive Director of Benjamin Rush Institute (BRI)_. The Benjamin Rush Institute believes everyone suffers when the patient-doctor relationship is undermined by bad healthcare regulations. BRI is a nonpartisan organization that seeks to educate and inform medical students about positive, proven healthcare policies that preserve and protect this fundamental medical relationship.

In fact, our chapters have been blocked on some medical school campuses by radical left-wing administrators, even though BRI's nonpartisan, free-market approach is focused on improving healthcare--not politics. But we're fighting back.

**Friend****, I am gearing up to start two dozen new BRI chapters at medical schools across the nation to combat the woke nonsense being taught. **

_I am humbly asking for your immediate support on this huge issue that isn 't being addressed_.

[_**Can you please donate $10, $35, $100, or any amount you can generously spare to the Benjamin Rush Institute (BRI)?**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zms1gj563ph1fdvdl5vu560uhjs9is128cq8k0lg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)

[_**Send $10 >> **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ivhghbrblntoai17902h71l9m40pm6k9qrgujo_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Send $25 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvv486jg2jas8rnriqhuvlo584osnqk35j2812do_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Send $50 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgpnmqkim5kso7b3cc7huncack6miv0tv7bcf2m8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Send $100 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmnfvqpjvlpsvm2c3vq2o3ebtth3u5uss8reffag_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a student $250 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj6ulla7mcul2q3s4fcl9pa6vn67cc0dilgtq26o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a speaker for $500 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcd54vckpmhte35vtt4ofannk90t0ilsartj4n00_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a chapter for $1,000 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv98tbhb3jnvkm1gdr3b6h0bhig8dmu2uv7ospp0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Send Any Amount >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhqa3b9petuceli5fegrm4h88pc5q73jf818495o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)

BRI student chapter members and their colleagues face severe opposition because they support free market, patient-friendly, doctor-focused models for the practice of medicine.

Mix social justice and woke ideology with new government-corporate sponsorship of medical school campuses and you have a recipe for disaster.**I fear doctors are not learning how to better serve patients. They are learning to be activists.**

BRI believes that the best way to deliver quality, affordable medical care is through a free enterprise, limited government system. Yet, most medical students today are instructed overwhelmingly in healthcare policy that promotes a government-mandated, insurance company approach to healthcare, and rarely--if ever--encounter a voice promoting free markets and the sanctity of the patient-doctor relationship. On some campuses, the government's role in healthcare is not even to be questioned.

_Now with the COVID of campus events and club formation, it 's become unquestionable that the government must dictate healthcare. _

Healthcare should not be focused on who is in office, Friend, but on what patients need.

I refuse to give up on medical students.

We cannot concede ground to these radicals. We must fight tooth and nail to expose the harm they are doing. BRI is fighting back by creating dozens of new chapters at medical schools.

But it's a costly fight. That is where you can help me. Please send your urgent support.

[_**Send $10 to BRI >> **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3clihm2hnndshbngr582luo8uu9cemhldo7621o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Send $25 to BRI >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1eua2n5asglt5aonjklcj3hn5locfr5ubi2bm6g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Send $50 to BRI >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2buioa5org2s4lubf7vg0eqpdq2j6f7dp8po8do_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Send $100 to BRI >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zckfbirlfjkfu4pcgoogd8u9q8r6t1opvdveaj3o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a student $250 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze01ho1npr7km2qifnhq5ars2bs1b0uaajo8ss18_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a speaker for $500 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zancndsa7a3vv829rm2tqopiqs114n5n21otc9a8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Sponsor a chapter for $1,000 >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs26hlce321ohfmipe2pdhm0f3asc5gbnusujogo_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)
[_**Send Any Amount >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5c8i3e5s3mg7or4ao0svvs7dnca512k07kp567o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph2bs)

Here's where your support will go.

* Your gift of just $25 will support the next edition of BRI's popular, student-produced Virtual Event Series.

* A $50 donation will promote an episode of BRI's Truth in Liberty series, also student produced, that presents first-hand accounts from patients, physicians, and others who have endured political oppression and medical tyranny.

* A $100 gift will underwrite the spring semester's popular NexGenMed student-produced podcast on iTunes--soon to be available on Amazon Music and Audible.

* A $250 donation will cover scholarship expenses--travel and conference fees--for a BRI student member to attend conferences such as the annual meeting of the Free Market Medical Association.

* A $500 gift will fund a speaker to travel to a medical school and make the case for free enterprise in healthcare.

* A $1,000 donation will support a BRI medical student chapter for an academic year.

Thank you for supporting BRI and together we can graduate doctors who care about their patients first and foremost.

Thank you,

Richard W. Walker
Executive Director
Benjamin Rush Institute

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp72nou3n22kp772jas4it5p3ohslo4v29l62pl8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p36cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Admiral Franken
subject: Fox "News"

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46421146/350196146/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmJlOThhMS00ZmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KeVz-kXTR4l7WcIKecqSnTYzFCiKF7ajlQunyxj8PWA=&emci=8a59d5c6-fce9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=bfbe98a1-4fea-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46421147/350196147/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmJlOThhMS00ZmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KeVz-kXTR4l7WcIKecqSnTYzFCiKF7ajlQunyxj8PWA=&emci=8a59d5c6-fce9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=bfbe98a1-4fea-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
As bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton.
As Russian tanks began pouring over the Ukrainian border, Fox News host Laura Ingraham had the gall to call Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky “pathetic.”
And if you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. **Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump.**
As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices.
Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president.
Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. **My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation.
**The polls show we can win.** The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.
**We need to raise another $50,000 before midnight tonight to win, but right now, we’re still falling dangerously short. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I need grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can spare before our critical deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46421148/350196149/-42398318?refcode=em20220612am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmJlOThhMS00ZmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KeVz-kXTR4l7WcIKecqSnTYzFCiKF7ajlQunyxj8PWA=)

clean_body: Hello, As bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton. As Russian tanks began pouring over the Ukrainian border, Fox News host Laura Ingraham had the gall to call Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky “pathetic.” And if you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump. As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices. Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president. Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug. If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation. The polls show we can win. The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate. We need to raise another $50,000 before midnight tonight to win, but right now, we’re still falling dangerously short. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I need grassroots donors like you to give now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Fox News’ propaganda cannot go unanswered. But it takes significant funding to run a full-scale campaign and take on all of Grassley’s and McConnell’s lies. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so whatever you can give today will go a long way. I am so thankful to have you on the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I’m asking, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Together, we can make sure every Georgian, no matter who they are or where they live, has the opportunity to thrive.
#
Derek,
I was my high school’s valedictorian and in Georgia, that meant being invited to a reception at the Governor’s Mansion.
My family didn’t have a car, so that morning, my parents and I took the bus from DeKalb to Buckhead. We arrived at the Governor’s Mansion and walked up the side of the driveway, next to the cars carrying valedictorians from across the state.
But when we reached the guard gate, a guard stepped out, looked at us and said, “You don’t belong here. This is a private event.”
He took one look at us walking up from the bus and assumed I couldn’t possibly be one of the valedictorians. My parents set him straight and we were eventually allowed in. But I don’t remember meeting the governor that day. What I remember is a man standing in front of the most powerful place in Georgia, telling me I didn’t belong.
**[Now, I’m running for Governor to represent all Georgians from that same powerful place. Will you contribute $5 to join our movement to open the gates of opportunity for every single Georgian?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46421378/350196913/1012776179?source=sa_em_welcomeseries2_3&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTQvMS85NDA4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDU4YjMyMS01MGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LPRKhSd0llEEx4fbX28B6zzoQtO_EVgKp1NXO9sOJ1Q=)**
For far too long, too many Georgians have felt like they don't belong. They feel unseen, unheard and left behind because of their zip code or background. Together, we can make sure every Georgian, no matter who they are or where they live, has the opportunity to thrive.
But first, we face a hard fight in this campaign. We know that whoever emerges from the Republican primary will be well-funded and that this race won’t be easy.
As we approach primary election day and prepare to enter the general election, it is imperative that we start strong with the resources we’ll need to compete. So I’m asking you to do something right now:
**[Can you contribute $5 or whatever you can afford to prove we’re ready to fight for One Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46421379/350196914/1012776179?source=sa_em_welcomeseries2_3&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTQvMS85NDA4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDU4YjMyMS01MGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LPRKhSd0llEEx4fbX28B6zzoQtO_EVgKp1NXO9sOJ1Q=)**
Let’s open that gate.
Stacey

name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: Today is a hard day for Orlando
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
49 lives
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46421424/350197065/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3342-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGEyODg5Yi00ZmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5ybmq0lBucsMLmv2zLmFKz_kfQnINinwK9ouVzAwRk=)
---
Today is a hard day for our community in Orlando.

June 12, 2016, should have been a day of love and acceptance spent in bliss. It was Latin night at Pulse nightclub, and the LGBTQ+ community in Orlando was celebrating Pride Month by joyfully gathering in a safe space.
What should have been a joyous occasion turned into a devastating nightmare. That night, Orlando witnessed the deadliest attack against the LGBTQ+ community in U.S. history. We lost 49 people in a mass shooting – and I am still mourning each of them on the sixth anniversary of this tragedy.
Today, I pray for the parents who will never get to hug their children again, the survivors who can still hear the gunshots like the tragedy is striking once more, and the LGBTQ+ people who were robbed of their sense of safety in their own hometown. But I also know that thoughts and prayers mean NOTHING without _action._
**I vow to honor the lives we lost – and the loved ones left behind – by working for a future in which we have banned the kind of assault weapons that took 49 lives that day, a future where LGBTQ+ people feel safe walking down the street and a future where we end white supremacist gun violence.**
I know that this anniversary may feel particularly heavy this year as we mourn those lost in the Uvalde and Buffalo mass shootings. Let me promise you now: The fight for our lives is far from over. I am doing everything in my power to protect our communities from gun violence – and with perseverance, I know we can pass commonsense gun safety laws in this country.
To the survivors of Pulse and the families of those murdered, I want you to know: I see your pain, and I am with you. I will go to the ends of the Earth to ensure that no other family has to feel the pain that you feel today.

With love and support,

Congresswoman Val Demings

clean_body: 49 lives | | | = Today is a hard day for our community in Orlando. June 12, 2016, should have been a day of love and acceptance spent in bliss. It was Latin night at Pulse nightclub, and the LGBTQ+ community in Orlando was celebrating Pride Month by joyfully gathering in a safe space. What should have been a joyous occasion turned into a devastating nightmare. That night, Orlando witnessed the deadliest attack against the LGBTQ+ community in U.S. history. We lost 49 people in a mass shooting – and I am still mourning each of them on the sixth anniversary of this tragedy. Today, I pray for the parents who will never get to hug their children again, the survivors who can still hear the gunshots like the tragedy is striking once more, and the LGBTQ+ people who were robbed of their sense of safety in their own hometown. But I also know that thoughts and prayers mean NOTHING without action. I vow to honor the lives we lost – and the loved ones left behind – by working for a future in which we have banned the kind of assault weapons that took 49 lives that day, a future where LGBTQ+ people feel safe walking down the street and a future where we end white supremacist gun violence. I know that this anniversary may feel particularly heavy this year as we mourn those lost in the Uvalde and Buffalo mass shootings. Let me promise you now: The fight for our lives is far from over. I am doing everything in my power to protect our communities from gun violence – and with perseverance, I know we can pass commonsense gun safety laws in this country. To the survivors of Pulse and the families of those murdered, I want you to know: I see your pain, and I am with you. I will go to the ends of the Earth to ensure that no other family has to feel the pain that you feel today. With love and support, Congresswoman Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. You can also click here to or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

In his book, Ben Carson tackles the issue of race in America and uses his experiences growing up in the toughest parts of Detroit to help us chart a better course.

While the Radical Left continues to use race to divide and tear us apart, we know there's a better way forward that can unite our country and bring us together.

This debate is so critical to America's future, and that is why every Conservative should read his new book.

Thank you,

Elisa

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn5c4tndlpuipoju2203aqopuuenelp1mq9bc7bo_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p35c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfccjm69ge9p5iesqj4sj4cupjfcpjedh6cdtke8p3adpkcson8tjje6qn6dhl61jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8qmcd30mdi60tj5coqm1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhohomjt6f654c6fsa2gdrt6u6ifm82jvjhfdpm0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p35c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zalesuqd0lppsegubgc5t7qsc5ibvil4cnf4apd8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p35c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfn3jduk7q87cakoebeolvf3ffmkqbrqg90fdba0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p35c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbjut2one06penv3p0fnuet449sm1vdnjcdsnpd8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h61p35c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Friend – voters across Nevada have already started casting their ballots in our must-win Senate race, and we have a major problem:

**THEN:** _National Journal_ named me the most vulnerable senator up for reelection, leaving no doubt that I'm Mitch McConnell's No. 1 target.
**NOW:** **With the Nevada primary just two days away, polling shows me 3 points behind in the most important race for Senate control.**
Experts agree that we can turn this around and save our Democratic Senate majority, but _only_ if we immediately raise the resources to fight back against the GOP's attacks. **But with Nevadans already starting to vote, we're falling WAY short of our critical $100,000 fundraising goal.**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4bj0njc5amsnpbj7o735d49c9q6p8b789fc4530_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1j61p74cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65stgs2pjbdbks4r63cdgcaob4s3kmpg64oj66gomep1im2qj1crgcsr66sbmcprjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p3aphkcapm8o3nc5j30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0uu4a0qs967opb8siknlo69npvt46sv0f63e6v8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1j61p74cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcrspo7te5jd15jcj0hd34al95s0qo87tjs52o50_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1j61p74cph2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zir0ton41o3en84e452ba8l8un8vomlf5kacrv90_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1j61p74cph2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5k62ess58fkapt89nruoac0fc08nuknpnopj7dg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1j61p74cph2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

**Ron DeSantis vowed to ELIMINATE gun permits and background checks in Florida, making it legal for _anyone_ to obtain and carry a weapon.** Instead of trying to protect our people, DeSantis is laser-focused on inflaming culture wars.

name: Rochelle Garza
subject: It’s PRIDE MONTH, y’all!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rochelle Garza for Texas
body:
| Hi there, **This month, I’m celebrating Pride alongside folks from every corner of our state.** LGBTQ+ Americans deserve to have their contributions to this country recognized and the freedom to live and love without fear. During Pride Month, let’s join together and commit to making our state a more welcoming place for everyone. **Y’all means ALL!** **We know that Texas Republicans have no interest in making Texas a more welcoming and safe place. name: Josh Lafazan
subject: They defended our democracy with everything they had
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46428034/350224229/1524799354?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQyMjQ4Ny01OWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PJDp0eky6FzbXbOowAglhQMdmI8a-8G1F62DaQsSjx8=&emci=743318cf-0ce9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=1a422487-59ea-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=17773801)
---

| | Peter, The January 6th hearings are showing the American people just how close we were to losing our democracy on that dark day, and just how much gratitude we owe to the brave officers of the Capitol Police. **On January 6th, those officers, along with the DC police, stood their ground and put their lives on the line, even though they knew they were outnumbered by the thousands.** Capitol Police officer Caroline Edwards testified that after she had been knocked unconscious by rioters, she woke up and _rejoined the line_. **Take a minute to reflect on that level of courage, Peter.** After that, she tended to wounded police officers and even tried to hold a different line until she was attacked with bear spray. **Caroline Edwards is a hero who did everything she could to protect the Capitol and defend our democracy.** She's not alone, Peter. Brian Sicknick to Eugene Goodman to Daniel Hodges – the Capitol Police and DC police will forever be our national heroes. We must honor their valor and sacrifice by holding those accountable who committed these grave crimes against our democracy and against our brave police officers. **It is my hope that every single insurrectionist, especially those who incited the violence and planned an attempted coup, are held accountable.** Our very democracy depends on it. _Josh_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info clean_body: | | | | Peter, The January 6th hearings are showing the American people just how close we were to losing our democracy on that dark day, and just how much gratitude we owe to the brave officers of the Capitol Police. On January 6th, those officers, along with the DC police, stood their ground and put their lives on the line, even though they knew they were outnumbered by the thousands. Capitol Police officer Caroline Edwards testified that after she had been knocked unconscious by rioters, she woke up and rejoined the line. Take a minute to reflect on that level of courage, Peter. After that, she tended to wounded police officers and even tried to hold a different line until she was attacked with bear spray. Caroline Edwards is a hero who did everything she could to protect the Capitol and defend our democracy. She's not alone, Peter. Brian Sicknick to Eugene Goodman to Daniel Hodges – the Capitol Police and DC police will forever be our national heroes. We must honor their valor and sacrifice by holding those accountable who committed these grave crimes against our democracy and against our brave police officers. It is my hope that every single insurrectionist, especially those who incited the violence and planned an attempted coup, are held accountable. Our very democracy depends on it. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1m8f3n8581vse5fhlojk0u8h18vquqt7dh34jf8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h69p76c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sli61qbcc34maq63c35c9qj8s9me1ij9oplmqobcclkscpmaodkm5gned73euoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p3aphkc2pm9o3ncdj3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqpri3987v4rp6b1ccj6aeqq26fvhhlkadt7vtn0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h69p76c5h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvh1ivb16mj9tu2cvgmfiioa3ukfudlp5avstm40_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h69p76c5h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z51tsh5hc6vs0n6o5vimaggb9ok8ppfj23q3fg4g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1h69p76c5h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
