name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeennjedg572vkt9freg94s5hd3k9fbup89vef5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1j61o74s9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf3ctic3ir6oj5cljr0olim8r3fctieop76cpimeo7atdjmeqe4crksjjb5d9gmsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8qmcd32mdi6fdr1cpqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt3ktielk4ogvk5rk444hupck0h3crn8a1o71mf8_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1j61o74s9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdmlh645c0rjo7jmjjucp6odr3l0e54528tskogg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1j61o74s9h2bs)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfrlt9cdqai4r3v7gnok60jbcn5oiv3beg134sc0_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1j61o74s9h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z38hjln3d59jhoj2b3vk5i13sj3gdavt8pf72obo_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1j61o74s9h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

We've been tracking the rise and fall of economies, markets and investments for over 50 years.
We've seen the best of times and the worst of times.
But we have never seen [anything quite like THIS before](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9kD9vhDAMxT8NbKDECQEGhlbVbdehqnRVl8gk4S4i_FESitRP31DUtZIX__xk-z3daaWRqtx2QACIoEAJb1hdDo02gjCmoVG05zzjBJ3xsfRm3XpnFc4RwzgsXplSLVP-6CjjfKgb07K66kmr2oFDZSqKCivsB8xvV3lF6-x8f8XJdD4O0gfpJ7kbG0LhrJGioFAASJq77hHjGjL2lMEl1b7v5fc8jSL68TiYELs9fzbHTMCVw8ehYxflDUb7ZaTVGXvhFWQgwrKlN0_yhnaecDT-4FtPE1qXFVXE2cR98ePJIXEiCAU4e3bqToQn48e690vxF13uO73u1jkbRJ0Cu0_J7W848X-zPwjuegs).
An ugly new force that has reared its head and is threatening to destroy the savings and investments of millions of unsuspecting Americans.
They've been led to believe everything is going to be OK.
But it's a bald-faced lie.
And it could lead to catastrophic results for retirees all across the country.
_I cannot just sit around and watch it happen._
That's why I've just released [this video](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9kD9vhDAMxT8NbKDECQEGhlbVbdehqnRVl8gk4S4i_FESitRP31DUtZIX__xk-z3daaWRqtx2QACIoEAJb1hdDo02gjCmoVG05zzjBJ3xsfRm3XpnFc4RwzgsXplSLVP-6CjjfKgb07K66kmr2oFDZSqKCivsB8xvV3lF6-x8f8XJdD4O0gfpJ7kbG0LhrJGioFAASJq77hHjGjL2lMEl1b7v5fc8jSL68TiYELs9fzbHTMCVw8ehYxflDUb7ZaTVGXvhFWQgwrKlN0_yhnaecDT-4FtPE1qXFVXE2cR98ePJIXEiCAU4e3bqToQn48e690vxF13uO73u1jkbRJ0Cu0_J7W848X-zPwjuegs) to reveal the truth about what's actually happening now — and what's about to happen next — so folks can immediately protect their hard-earned money.
This is more than a prediction of something that might happen down the road. It's ALREADY beginning to tear apart the present-day life of millions.
So, the urgency is undeniable.
My video reveals everything.
To discover the truth, [click here.](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJx9kD9vhDAMxT8NbKDECQEGhlbVbdehqnRVl8gk4S4i_FESitRP31DUtZIX__xk-z3daaWRqtx2QACIoEAJb1hdDo02gjCmoVG05zzjBJ3xsfRm3XpnFc4RwzgsXplSLVP-6CjjfKgb07K66kmr2oFDZSqKCivsB8xvV3lF6-x8f8XJdD4O0gfpJ7kbG0LhrJGioFAASJq77hHjGjL2lMEl1b7v5fc8jSL68TiYELs9fzbHTMCVw8ehYxflDUb7ZaTVGXvhFWQgwrKlN0_yhnaecDT-4FtPE1qXFVXE2cR98ePJIXEiCAU4e3bqToQn48e690vxF13uO73u1jkbRJ0Cu0_J7W848X-zPwjuegs)

Peter,

As I travel across Wisconsin to meet people from Milwaukee to Dunn County and everywhere in between, I hear one thing: **_People want change._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46432927/350234159/303781697?refcode=EM_FR_220612FR_N_AL_60DA_5_G_TestB_PT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmFmZjUyMi01ZmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ztF-onTDKiVwmxX12wPFSzz7XK0ZjdHvJCDqBTzPcp8=)
(Meeting with folks from Dunn County) This campaign is about so much more than just defeating Ron Johnson. **[Before I continue, I’m asking you to make a donation of whatever you can today to help us bring change to Wisconsin>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46432929/350234161/303781697?refcode=EM_FR_220612FR_N_AL_60DA_5_G_TestB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmFmZjUyMi01ZmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ztF-onTDKiVwmxX12wPFSzz7XK0ZjdHvJCDqBTzPcp8=)**

Yes, we must first and foremost defeat self-serving Ron Johnson in November, because that’s our best shot at solidifying the Senate Majority and getting rid of one of the worst Senators in the country. But I’m running to bring change to Wisconsin and help Democrats pass more common-sense and urgent legislation that would improve the lives of Wisconsinites and put money back in the pockets of people.

The challenges we face today are monumental. Inflation, high gas prices, and now the unthinkable threat to the right to choose. While Ron Johnson is doing nothing to help with any of the challenges we face, I’m running because I have a track record of getting things done.

**[This is why we must defeat Ron Johnson, so we can start meeting our challenges head-on. clean_body: This campaign is about so much more than just defeating Ron Johnson. | | = Peter, As I travel across Wisconsin to meet people from Milwaukee to Dunn County and everywhere in between, I hear one thing: People want change. = (Meeting with folks from Dunn County) This campaign is about so much more than just defeating Ron Johnson. = Yes, we must first and foremost defeat self-serving Ron Johnson in November, because that’s our best shot at solidifying the Senate Majority and getting rid of one of the worst Senators in the country. But I’m running to bring change to Wisconsin and help Democrats pass more common-sense and urgent legislation that would improve the lives of Wisconsinites and put money back in the pockets of people. The challenges we face today are monumental. Inflation, high gas prices, and now the unthinkable threat to the right to choose. While Ron Johnson is doing nothing to help with any of the challenges we face, I’m running because I have a track record of getting things done. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Together, we can win this. Thank you, Alex Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. name: Joy Hofmeister
subject: Some news to share
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JOY HOFMEISTER 2022 Friends of Joy Hofmeister 2022
body:
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46433785/350235040/1127668677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWMwNGZkZi01ZmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b54KOuIjkr4tD7Rd4ndowqt0qYqLn1B2pVYnAzPjgS8=&emci=06cc425a-0948-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fac04fdf-5fea-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=13997030)
---
Hi Peter,

I'm writing to you because you're someone who cares about the future of Oklahoma. Because you can see that Governor Stitt is running our state into the ground through his extremism and ineffective leadership. And because you know we need a change.

That's why I'm running for Governor -- and I'm proud to be running as a Democrat. I hope you'll take a moment to hear me out, and then think about joining our campaign.

You may know me from my time in public service and my previous campaigns, when I ran as a Republican. And while I am changing my party affiliation, I am not changing my values, or who I am.

I've been all over this state, and talked to people about what matters most to them and their communities. I'm taking on Governor Stitt because, the fact is, he doesn't represent the values that Oklahomans, regardless of their political party, hold dear. Values like common sense, willingness to work together and the courage to take on any challenge.

I believe that we can pull together -- across any divisions -- to support our children's education, fight for better health care, improve our rural infrastructure, and so much more that will help Oklahoma families get ahead.

I've already established a record of standing up to Governor Stitt. I led the way when it came to improving our schools and advocating for our kids' safety. But we have more to do, and I'm going to continue that fight.

I'm ready to get to work for a better Oklahoma, but I know that I can't do it alone.

[**Peter, if you've got a few minutes, please watch my campaign announcement video -- then chip in $5, $10 or whatever you can so that we can keep building momentum, I would really appreciate it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46433787/350235042/1534411231?refcode=em21_2021_ws1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWMwNGZkZi01ZmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b54KOuIjkr4tD7Rd4ndowqt0qYqLn1B2pVYnAzPjgS8=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46433789/350235044/1534411231?refcode=em21_2021_ws1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWMwNGZkZi01ZmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b54KOuIjkr4tD7Rd4ndowqt0qYqLn1B2pVYnAzPjgS8=)
---
[WATCH THE VIDEO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46433790/350235045/1534411231?refcode=em21_2021_ws1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWMwNGZkZi01ZmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b54KOuIjkr4tD7Rd4ndowqt0qYqLn1B2pVYnAzPjgS8=)
I hope you'll join us in this effort to restore Oklahoma values to the Governor's office. We've got a long way to go -- and I can't wait for the road ahead.

Take care,

\-- Joy

subject: We don't like to beg, team >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
You’re as much a part of this team as the staff here at headquarters. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46434723/350237416/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI2YzE2Ni02MGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6SWxpzfsJMrs-kN9uc2II3C3cOA_y1reSLpr0eX1ayo=)
Folks, We don’t like to beg for donations or use scare tactics like “the sky is falling” when we ask for your support. You’re as much a part of this team as the staff here at headquarters, and the work it takes to keep Colorado blue and defend Michael’s seat is deeply personal. This grassroots team is made up of staff members, generous grassroots donors, and loyal supporters and we’re all here for the same reasons:
* We believe that every child should have a fighting chance, no matter where they grow up.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46434724/350237417/335196137?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI2YzE2Ni02MGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6SWxpzfsJMrs-kN9uc2II3C3cOA_y1reSLpr0eX1ayo=)
* We know that climate change is an urgent threat to our way of life and that we have the power to fight it.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46434727/350237418/335196137?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI2YzE2Ni02MGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6SWxpzfsJMrs-kN9uc2II3C3cOA_y1reSLpr0eX1ayo=)
* We believe health care should be affordable and no one should be one illness away from losing all they’ve worked for.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46434729/350237419/335196137?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI2YzE2Ni02MGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6SWxpzfsJMrs-kN9uc2II3C3cOA_y1reSLpr0eX1ayo=)
* We believe we should leave our democracy stronger for the next generation.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46434730/350237420/335196137?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI2YzE2Ni02MGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6SWxpzfsJMrs-kN9uc2II3C3cOA_y1reSLpr0eX1ayo=) **_And we know Michael refuses to accept that our economy and democracy are too broken to fix and he always puts Colorado first over partisan games._** This campaign is about building on Michael’s progress delivering for Coloradans. We don’t need to use scare tactics when the reality of Mitch McConnell leading the Senate into a legislative graveyard is still a recent memory. clean_body: You’re as much a part of this team as the staff here at headquarters. | = Folks, We don’t like to beg for donations or use scare tactics like “the sky is falling” when we ask for your support. You’re as much a part of this team as the staff here at headquarters, and the work it takes to keep Colorado blue and defend Michael’s seat is deeply personal. This grassroots team is made up of staff members, generous grassroots donors, and loyal supporters and we’re all here for the same reasons: We believe that every child should have a fighting chance, no matter where they grow up. = We know that climate change is an urgent threat to our way of life and that we have the power to fight it. = We believe health care should be affordable and no one should be one illness away from losing all they’ve worked for. = We believe we should leave our democracy stronger for the next generation. = And we know Michael refuses to accept that our economy and democracy are too broken to fix and he always puts Colorado first over partisan games. This campaign is about building on Michael’s progress delivering for Coloradans. We don’t need to use scare tactics when the reality of Mitch McConnell leading the Senate into a legislative graveyard is still a recent memory. Your support today helps fund the rapid response efforts we’ll need to set the record straight on Michael’s work, hire and train staff, talk to voters, and so much more. Please pitch in $10 — or whatever works for your budget — to help re-elect Michael and help us keep building on the progress he’s made for families in Colorado and nationwide. name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: A bright light during dark hours
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsK4mh6hXN

Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you
from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent,
conservative college located
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osK4mh6hXN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

I hope you are having a fine day so far.
Thanks for opening my email.

Today, I'm writing to let you know about a
special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely
independent, conservative college located in south-central
Michigan where I work.

You may have heard of us on talk radio,
social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of
our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty-like our
free online courses.

And though we're best known for educating
Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through
these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been
about a famous British author-C.S. Lewis.

In fact, our free online course, "An
Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance," has more
than 500,000 people enrolled.

C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light
during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my
absolute favorite authors because...

…While you may know him for his
landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant
philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we
decided to develop this online course.

Since launching "An Introduction to C.S.
Lewis: Writings and Significance," we've received an outpouring
of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope
of Lewis' writings.

We've also heard from many of our friends
that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to
announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your
home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small
group, such as a Bible study or book club.

We only made a few of these special sets, so
get this premium edition of "An Introduction to C.S. Lewis:
Writings and Significance" on DVD today. Given how popular this
course is, the DVD box set won't last long.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure
link, while they last:

https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor
Outreach
Hillsdale College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Maggie Hassan HQ
subject: This email is only 1,017 characters long.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
This email is only 1,017 characters long. What’s the significance of 1,017, you ask?
| | |
---
This email is only 1,017 characters long. What’s the significance of 1,017, you ask?

**In 2016, Maggie Hassan narrowly won her Senate race by just 1,017 votes – one of the closest races in history.** That number represents every last voter who turned up to the polls to cast their vote for the Senator in the name of health care, reproductive rights, voting rights, and so much more.

But here’s the bad news: Political experts like Rachel Maddow are saying that Maggie's facing a tough reelection fight, and her race this November will be one of the closest in the country.

The good news? Maggie’s no stranger to tough fights, and we’re doing everything we can to ensure she wins in November – including reaching out to grassroots supporters like you and asking for help.
**[Please, will you rush a gift of $3 right now to defend this seat and our vulnerable Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46436625/350242316/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1071-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGFlY2NjNS02MWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9PrStVjVJ7VP-7Qd9gmo8Ur-v1MBlI1r_qijS-4eOT8=)**
| | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46436626/350242317/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1071-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGFlY2NjNS02MWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9PrStVjVJ7VP-7Qd9gmo8Ur-v1MBlI1r_qijS-4eOT8=)

clean_body: This email is only 1,017 characters long. What’s the significance of 1,017, you ask? | | | This email is only 1,017 characters long. What’s the significance of 1,017, you ask? In 2016, Maggie Hassan narrowly won her Senate race by just 1,017 votes – one of the closest races in history. That number represents every last voter who turned up to the polls to cast their vote for the Senator in the name of health care, reproductive rights, voting rights, and so much more. But here’s the bad news: Political experts like Rachel Maddow are saying that Maggie's facing a tough reelection fight, and her race this November will be one of the closest in the country. The good news? Maggie’s no stranger to tough fights, and we’re doing everything we can to ensure she wins in November – including reaching out to grassroots supporters like you and asking for help. = | | = Thank you for being an integral member of this grassroots team. name: Marco Rubio (Personal)
subject: I'll be blunt, Patriot 😬
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | I'll be blunt, Patriot.

My biggest deadline of the year is here, and if we don't raise enough to meet my goal, you can say goodbye to Trump's legacy.

Here are the facts:
* _Fox News_ said my race could be the most expensive ever.
* _CNN_ moved my race up on their list of Top 10 seats likely to flip and said my race is the "most important race for the Dems."
* My opponent outraised me FOUR QUARTERS in a row.
* _Roll Call_ labeled me the most vulnerable Republican Senator running for reelection.

I need you to listen to me, Patriot. If Dems expand their total control of the Senate, we can kiss Trump's legacy goodbye! **[Please rush in $18 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568160:64w2MFoN6:m:1:3299561967:4E6E5141719E74061A397E73DE72ED33:r "Please rush in $18 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight >>")**
**[<< RUSH IN $18 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568160:64w2MFoN6:m:1:3299561967:4E6E5141719E74061A397E73DE72ED33:r "<< RUSH IN $18 >>")
[<< RUSH IN $35 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568161:64w2MFoN6:m:1:3299561967:4E6E5141719E74061A397E73DE72ED33:r "<< RUSH IN $35 >>")
[<< RUSH IN $75 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568162:64w2MFoN6:m:1:3299561967:4E6E5141719E74061A397E73DE72ED33:r "<< RUSH IN $75 >>")
[<< RUSH IN $125 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568163:64w2MFoN6:m:1:3299561967:4E6E5141719E74061A397E73DE72ED33:r "<< RUSH IN $125 >>")
[<< RUSH IN $250 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568164:64w2MFoN6:m:1:3299561967:4E6E5141719E74061A397E73DE72ED33:r "<< RUSH IN $250 >>")**
To make the stakes even more significant, a poll came out that separates me and my liberal opponent by only 2%, Patriot. Only 2% -- that means **every single dollar counts.**

**[I need your support right now if we want to take back the Senate. Will you help me, Patriot?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568165:64w2MFoN6:m:1:3299561967:4E6E5141719E74061A397E73DE72ED33:r "I need your
support right now if we want to take back the Senate. Will you help me, Patriot?")**
---
| | | [DONATE NOW >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568165:64w2MFoN6:m:1:3299561967:4E6E5141719E74061A397E73DE72ED33:r "DONATE NOW >>>")
---
Thank you for your help,
Marco Rubio
---
| | | | |
* * *
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568166:64w2MFoN6:m:1:3299561967:4E6E5141719E74061A397E73DE72ED33:r "Footer Graphic 1")
---
I talk to folks every day who say they haven't donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn't close.

Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we're only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads.

With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference.

**[Please, can you give $4, 8, $12.55, or $17 today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568166:64w2MFoN6:m:1:3299561967:4E6E5141719E74061A397E73DE72ED33:r "Please, can you give $4, 8, $12.55, or $17 today?")**

I just need a minute of your time.

Every day in America, 110 people lose their lives to gun violence and more than 200 are shot and wounded.1

But the far-right continues to allow the NRA and pro-gun lobbyists to stand in the way of common-sense gun reform _that will save lives._

As one of just three Democratic physicians serving in Congress, I know that in order to fight back against the gun lobby, we must call gun violence what it is: **a public health crisis.**

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Hi there, just checking in. Dr. Ruiz is 1 of 3 Democratic physicians in Congress who knows that gun violence is a public health crisis and will vote to pass laws that will treat it as such. In order for him to keep fighting to keep communities safer, he needs grassroots supporters to help defend his seat from far-right Republicans in this year’s midterm election. But we noticed that you’re donation is missing and we’re just [80] gifts away from hitting our daily goal! | | | | | | | Thanks for your help, Justice M. Team Ruiz \------------------ FORWARDED MESSAGE ------------------ I just need a minute of your time. Every day in America, 110 people lose their lives to gun violence and more than 200 are shot and wounded.1 But the far-right continues to allow the NRA and pro-gun lobbyists to stand in the way of common-sense gun reform that will save lives. As one of just three Democratic physicians serving in Congress, I know that in order to fight back against the gun lobby, we must call gun violence what it is: a public health crisis. I’m determined to fight for common-sense gun reform that will save lives and make our communities safer. But votes are still being tallied from yesterday’s primary and far-right Republicans are seeking to unseat me and ruin our progress. | | | From Buffalo, NY to Laguna Woods, CA to Uvalde, TX, communities across our nation are torn apart by the trauma of gun violence on a daily basis. Even more devastatingly, we have every resource necessary to combat this public health emergency. But the NRA’s hold on Congress continues to hinder progress toward common-sense gun reform -- and every day we delay, more lives are lost. But I am a firm believer that it doesn’t have to be this way. Democrats are working harder than ever to pass laws that address gun violence as the true public health crisis it is. We CAN make our communities safer and save lives – but only if we prevent NRA-backed Republicans from becoming the majority. | | | | | | Thank you for investing in this fight, \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress 1\. Everytown for Gun Safety Support Fund: “Gun Violence in America” | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Pennsylvania Democrats
subject: tell Pat Toomey to take action on gun reform:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
Peter,

Today is the anniversary of the Pulse Nightclub shooting in Orlando, Florida, a shooting that killed 49 people, and wounded 53. This was the deadliest incident of violence against the LGBTQ+ community in United States history.

This anniversary comes on the tails of a plague of mass shootings right here in Pennsylvania. And unfortunately, our communities face the threat of gun violence every single day.

It's far past time for action to stop gun violence. We need our leaders to take action and pass gun reform laws.

Please, take a moment from your Sunday to call or email Pennsylvania Senator Pat Toomey, and urge him to vote for common sense gun laws.
**Call 202-224-4254 to reach Pat Toomey's Washington DC office and demand gun reform**

[**Click here to email Pat Toomey and demand gun reform →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46437894/350249930/470468072?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzU1YzVjMS02OGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BZggWJm_xEmUTzlDk-dD9jI4mHzA_X40VhQomEjKn3I=&emci=82f68cb1-2ae8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e755c5c1-68ea-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25616296)
The Senate needs 10 Republican votes to help Democrats pass gun reform.

We have to keep up the pressure, so we're mobilizing our team to call Pat Toomey and demand action.

Make sure to forward this email to your friends and family and ask them to call too.

Thanks for fighting,

PA Democrats

Thank you for supporting the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. Pennsylvania is one of the most important swing states in the country. Donald Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016, and in 2020, we flipped our Commonwealth blue and elected Joe Biden. If we're going to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2022, we need your help. name: ICYMI News
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbcp3pfo8peei4ksc45s0k1rs10o7ti8e0a3qf9o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpr8or7mgqj4cr1euor9cplm5jm7dhk65pb4s72mpoect9mcmqm0ojn61onccb76v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6lj38pplmjjr4sj664ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clim0ob4sdh66oh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm6mtri89afbrm7jsa65dhg1h4dsp8a3u7idu47o_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1gm9or2cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4kj99oaedo3chl87le3o01strfddp8vmo7e75tg_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1gm9or2cdh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6nbb8jsuv0bc2dq14b8995gscvntne6gj80nkto_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1gm9or2cdh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

clean_body: While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe | | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others? Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King” examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel. | | This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link: By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum. | | | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying “The David Story.” Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of “The David Story” while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty. body:
I have bad news. You’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have broken a 2-year support streak.

Fellow Conservative,

**I have bad news. You 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have broken a 2-year support streak.**

I am so disappointed. You seemed like such a great Republican supporter. And now that Republicans are on the verge of winning back the House Majority, we need you more than ever.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Rudy Giuliani freedom fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Dragged off a plane and shackled in leg irons by the FBI...
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568298:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---
Peter,
---
Many of President Trump's closest associates have been subpoenaed by Pelosi's Congress, _myself included._
---
One of those associates, Peter Navarro, the genius behind President Trump's America First trade deals, was just **_DRAGGED_ _OFF_ _A_ _PLANE_** and **_SHACKLED_ _IN_ _LEG_ _IRONS_** and denied food, water, and an attorney.
---
Navarro was treated like a political prisoner by the Biden-Harris FBI.
---
...**_The same FBI that launched a dawn raid on my apartment._**
---
After I just testified before Pelosi's Congress last month, the attacks against Trump associates are getting more and more intense. I need your help now more than ever before.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as the Biden-Harris FBI seeks to treat former Trump associates as political prisoners.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568298:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568298:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568299:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568300:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568301:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568302:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568303:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568298:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---

What I've described sounds like something you'd hear from the Soviet Union... not America.
---
Here's what Tucker Carlson had to say:
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568298:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---
The Biden-Harris Administration has thrown every old principle of justice and the rule of law straight out the window.
---
Worst of all, their attacks are getting nastier by the day, and I think we all know why...
---
...Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Nancy Pelosi know they're plummeting in the polls. 80% of Americans think our nation is on the wrong track. I'd love to meet the 20% of voters who think America is prospering, but I have a hunch they're mostly dead voters...
---
Suffice to say, Biden, Kamala, and Pelosi are expecting a BLOODBATH in the midterm elections this November.
---
_So, as a last-ditch effort to hold onto their power and exert their executive force, they've resorted to publicly turning former Trump associates into political enemies and have weaponized the FBI to carry out their plans._
---
Their displays of power are intended to _intimidate_ us.
---
**But as the man who served as President Trump's attorney and successfully fought for his freedom, I don't give in to intimidation tactics.**
---
Hear it from President Trump himself:
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568298:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---
While I fought for President Trump's freedom, I now have to humbly ask for your help fighting for _my_ freedom.
---
After seeing someone like Peter Navarro shackled in leg irons, I worry what's to come next.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as the Biden-Harris FBI seeks to treat former Trump associates as political prisoners.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568298:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568298:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568298:JowVzFoPN:m:1:3253819041:03997CE98F2D92400B180B944BF90D2A:r)
---
---

Now that Trump has endorsed Hinson, we can expect his allied PACs and supporters to flood dark money into this highly competitive race. Across the country, all eyes will be on this race. We can expect more attacks on Liz, and we must be ready to fight back. = = = National Republicans and outside groups will do anything to stop Liz from winning here in IA-02. That’s why your support, no matter the amount, is critical to our success. Where bodily autonomy and access to the ballot box are sacred rights... Where we invest in our roads, schools, and each other... And where neighbors of all races, genders, sexual orientations, and beliefs are welcomed with loving arms. I need as many people as possible to hear my message, loud and clear. Tonight will be the first and last chance to reach some voters before the Special Election — we need to make it count. name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: I will not stand silent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46420929/350195511/-1799768830?amount=3&refcode=UD_20220612_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0YmU5OGExLTRmZWEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YhJzKYW1e68P8efEkCZkcSrhqj6h9w1aprVXxEW4KUc=) Peter,

Well, that didn’t take long. **Less than an hour after I was declared the Democratic nominee for Senate in Iowa, the attacks from Chuck Grassley began.**

_“The most liberal nominee in Iowa Senate history”
“Radical”
“Socialist” _

Gotta love it!

Chuck Grassley doesn’t know what to say about me. He’s never faced an opponent like me before. I’m his political nightmare, so he’s just throwing cow pies at the wall and hoping something sticks.

Calling me “radical” is laughable when Chuck Grassley supports a complete ban on abortion and letting literally anyone buy an AR-15 without even a background check. **But there’s one attack that I absolutely won’t take lying down, and that’s Chuck Grassley’s attacking me for serving our country for 36 years in the U.S. Navy.**

Grassley is already trying to say that because I enlisted in the military at age 19, because my deployments meant that my family had to move from state-to-state and country-to-country... that I’m not an Iowan anymore.

Chuck Grassley wants to pretend that I wasn’t raised in rural, northwest Iowa. He ignores the enormous sacrifices that my family – my wife and my kids – made to allow me to serve in the Navy.

**Grassley’s attacks denigrate every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, spend holidays away from each other, and be absent from life’s big events like weddings and the birth of a child.**

**And if Chuck Grassley thinks that I will stand silent while he says that every Iowan who puts on our country’s uniform stops being an Iowan... he’s delusional.**

These are the kinds of attacks I’m going to be up against. Nasty stuff from Chuck Grassley, Mitch McConnell, and the Fox ‘Entertainment’ News propaganda network.

There’s one reason why: The GOP is scared. They’ve seen the polls, and they know that if we defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, Democrats are guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority.

**In order to fight back, we need to raise another $100,000 before midnight tomorrow, but the only way we’ll hit our goal and send Grassley packing is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**

[Please, can I count on you to split a donation of $3 or more right now between my campaign and UniteDemocrats – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46420931/350195514/-1799768830?amount=3&refcode=UD_20220612_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0YmU5OGExLTRmZWEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YhJzKYW1e68P8efEkCZkcSrhqj6h9w1aprVXxEW4KUc=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mike Franken and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46420945/350195529/-1799768830?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20220612_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0YmU5OGExLTRmZWEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YhJzKYW1e68P8efEkCZkcSrhqj6h9w1aprVXxEW4KUc=)

[Or CONTRIBUTE a custom donation »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46420949/350195533/-1799768830?amount=10&amounts=3,7,10&refcode=UD_20220612_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0YmU5OGExLTRmZWEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YhJzKYW1e68P8efEkCZkcSrhqj6h9w1aprVXxEW4KUc=)

name: Josh Harder
subject: my community’s experience with a school shooting
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pOL37HmKXiTEoo5QymI06-2IMjVyApdXDyAJZtJcAHA=/Ev807ci62TPk863JwlvZECp-m0P9cNC1OlxqISAVh3Q=) | Peter, Thirty years ago there was a tragic shooting at an elementary school in my community. On January 17, 1989, a gunman used a semi-automatic rifle to shoot and kill 5 innocent children and wound 32 others. He fired more than 100 rounds in three minutes, forever scarring the City of Stockton and the Central Valley. I was five years old when that happened. Now I have a child of my own and yet nothing has changed, in fact, it's just gotten worse. Thirty years, hundreds and hundreds of shootings later, and federal action is at a standstill. **Right now, every single Member of Congress needs to look themselves in the eyes and ask: How do we keep failing? What are we doing right now when our kids are terrified to go to school?** _Where is our conscience?_ This week I voted to pass a sweeping gun safety bill that includes common sense reforms like prohibiting the sale of AR-15s to people under the age of 21, banning magazines that hold more than 15 rounds of ammunition, and establishing stricter rules for gun storage. On one hand, I'm hopeful that by passing this bill it pushes the Senate to come to the table and maybe we can get something done. On the other hand, I also saw 204 of my Republican colleagues vote no - they refuse to put the safety of our kids over the NRA. Frankly it's appalling. [**Please join me in pushing Senate Republicans to grow a conscience and get a gun safety reform bill done. You can add your name here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pOL37HmKXiTEoo5QymI06-2IMjVyApdXDyAJZtJcAHA=/iZeGyNPI7U6ea4gwMpv676Li4WKI8CnsowwocOCexD8=) I pray this time will be different. \- Josh

clean_body: | = | Peter, Thirty years ago there was a tragic shooting at an elementary school in my community. On January 17, 1989, a gunman used a semi-automatic rifle to shoot and kill 5 innocent children and wound 32 others. He fired more than 100 rounds in three minutes, forever scarring the City of Stockton and the Central Valley. I was five years old when that happened. Now I have a child of my own and yet nothing has changed, in fact, it's just gotten worse. Thirty years, hundreds and hundreds of shootings later, and federal action is at a standstill. Right now, every single Member of Congress needs to look themselves in the eyes and ask: How do we keep failing? What are we doing right now when our kids are terrified to go to school? Where is our conscience? This week I voted to pass a sweeping gun safety bill that includes common sense reforms like prohibiting the sale of AR-15s to people under the age of 21, banning magazines that hold more than 15 rounds of ammunition, and establishing stricter rules for gun storage. On one hand, I'm hopeful that by passing this bill it pushes the Senate to come to the table and maybe we can get something done. On the other hand, I also saw 204 of my Republican colleagues vote no - they refuse to put the safety of our kids over the NRA. Frankly it's appalling. = I pray this time will be different. \- Josh * = =

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: Politicians in Washington are letting our children down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
This day is always important, but this year feels extra special.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46440014/350260250/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk50-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWI4NWZkYi03MWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fN_PIkRj7-CAskf6IH-kAI0NkSt6tvOXX-YHCqQzvhY=)
---
Peter – Today is International Children's Day. This day is always important, but this year feels extra special. You see, just a couple weeks ago, I was blessed with a new grandson.
Seeing his sweet face at just a few hours old and watching my daughter beam with pride and joy is a feeling like no other. **Welcoming my beautiful grandson to the world has reminded me all over again just how precious our children are – and just how fiercely we must advocate for their futures.**
Children's causes have compelled me to serve and give back throughout my entire life – as a nurse treating children, as a volunteer caring for vulnerable homeless children, and as a humanitarian supporting organizations dedicated to making life better for kids. Advocating for our children is one of the causes most near and dear to my heart.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46440016/350260252/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk50-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWI4NWZkYi03MWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fN_PIkRj7-CAskf6IH-kAI0NkSt6tvOXX-YHCqQzvhY=)
**But right now, the politicians in Washington are letting our kids down.** It's hard enough raising a kid – or being one. Today, families have to worry about if they're safe at school, if there is formula on the shelves, and if basic necessities like food or diapers are affordable.
Parents and kids need support, compassion, and action. But that's not what they're getting from Washington. **Just last month, amidst a terrifying and ongoing baby formula shortage, nearly 200 representatives voted against making formula more accessible.**
Honestly, this type of complete callousness just doesn't make sense to me, Peter. **If you're not in Washington to fight for our kids, then who are you there for?** That's not just a failure of leadership – it's a complete lack of morals and compassion.
**I promise you that I'll lead with kindness and that I will always – _always_ – put our children first, before politics. That's why I'm in this race: We need a nurse's heart in the Senate. [_If you agree with me on this, I hope that I can count on you to chip in a grassroots donation today to support my campaign. Any amount would mean so much to me._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46440018/350260254/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk50-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWI4NWZkYi03MWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fN_PIkRj7-CAskf6IH-kAI0NkSt6tvOXX-YHCqQzvhY=)**

| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46440019/350260256/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk50-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWI4NWZkYi03MWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fN_PIkRj7-CAskf6IH-kAI0NkSt6tvOXX-YHCqQzvhY=)

name: Chief Val Demings
subject: the GOP is questioning my loyalty to the men and women in law enforcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Marco Rubio is desperate
| | |
---
Friend: This is an especially important message about my 27 years of dedicated service as a police officer. As Marco Rubio launches desperate attacks on my law enforcement career, I hope you'll read this to the end.
I entered the police academy because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm. After graduating at the top of my class, I woke up and put on my uniform every day, ready to risk my life because _ _ I took an oath to protect and serve the people of Florida.
**While I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician. **I’ll put my record up against his any day – but the problem is, Rubio has the powerful influence of the GOP dark-money machine on his side.
As national Republicans spend millions of dollars on attack ads that question my loyalty to the men and women in law enforcement, I need your help today to set the record straight: [**Will you donate $5 or more to help me reach more voters and flip Florida blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46439854/350259377/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3438-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTZjNzMyNy03MWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J3oaC7UFJ7SLbosI1auQjUr6oDHHXZ4gZvT8-4B8sAo=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46439855/350259378/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3438-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTZjNzMyNy03MWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J3oaC7UFJ7SLbosI1auQjUr6oDHHXZ4gZvT8-4B8sAo=)
Back in 1983, **I was one of only three women in my police academy class**. But after years of hard work and dedication, I rose to the top of the department and became the first woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police.
My story doesn't stop there. When I was appointed chief of police, Orlando was in crisis. The murder rate was at an all-time high, but I brought the department together and built relationships within the community. Standing with the brave men and women of the Orlando Police Department, we reduced violent crime by 40%.
To protect the city of Orlando, it took long, sleepless nights. And if I'm elected to the Senate, I'm ready to spend long nights protecting our right to vote, reproductive rights, access to health care and so much more.
I'll never stop fighting to protect and serve. If you're with me, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now to flip Florida blue.

Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46439856/350259379/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3438-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTZjNzMyNy03MWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J3oaC7UFJ7SLbosI1auQjUr6oDHHXZ4gZvT8-4B8sAo=)**
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for joining this grassroots movement.

Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46439857/350259380/1417698435?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTZjNzMyNy03MWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J3oaC7UFJ7SLbosI1auQjUr6oDHHXZ4gZvT8-4B8sAo=&emci=07b81f3e-3ce8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=756c7327-71ea-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: We need a big fundraising day today to stay on track to hit our goals!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We still have some work to do, but we’re confident we can get there.
#

Friends —
Can you please make your first $3 donation to our people-powered campaign today?
Sorry to be so direct, but our June FEC fundraising deadline is coming up quick. This is the most important deadline of the year so far, because at the end of this month we’re legally required to report how much we’ve raised. Everyone — the media, our allies, our opponents — will be watching. We need a big fundraising day today to stay on track to hit our contribution goals and show how strong this campaign really is.
As of this morning, we have a long way to go, but we’re confident that with your support we can get where we need to be before the end of the month.
So, as we approach our fundraising deadline, we have to ask:
[**If you are able, can you please make your first $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take A LOT of people chipping in to reach our goal.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june22.PHGn67&refcode=em220612-1-7%7D&t=1&akid=3033%2E6688874%2EU1yTHn)

clean_body: We still have some work to do, but we’re confident we can get there. Friends — Can you please make your first $3 donation to our people-powered campaign today? Sorry to be so direct, but our June FEC fundraising deadline is coming up quick. This is the most important deadline of the year so far, because at the end of this month we’re legally required to report how much we’ve raised. Everyone — the media, our allies, our opponents — will be watching. We need a big fundraising day today to stay on track to hit our contribution goals and show how strong this campaign really is. As of this morning, we have a long way to go, but we’re confident that with your support we can get where we need to be before the end of the month. My reasons for running for Congress are no secret:

I will deliver on healthcare and pharmaceutical cost reform and make healthcare affordable and accessible. I will fight tirelessly to lead our state’s economy into an era of robust growth so that our families can stay here and succeed. I will strongly advocate for defending our land from the dangers of climate change and I am a strong voice for our subsistence culture and way of life. I will protect a woman’s right to make her own healthcare decisions and to keep the government out of personal decisions that do not affect others, like the use of cannabis or gender identity or sexuality. I will work to end dark money’s influence on our politics, and will always put your voices ahead of those of other politicians’ wealthy campaign contributors.

It’s time for a true change. I’m so glad to see that the special primary’s results show that Alaskans feel the same, too. We deserve to live in a country where our government fights for everyday, working people -- not special interests. And as your congressman, I will work with you to help bring that change for Alaskans.

name: Patty Murray
subject: The DeVos/Smiley education priorities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Our students deserve better.
#
Peter,
The Biden Administration recently forgave student loans for millions of borrowers who attended the for-profit and now out-of-business Corinthian Colleges.
This is one of the many steps I’ve been pushing for to fix our broken student loan system. But for years, President Trump’s Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos–whose family is backing Tiffany Smiley–not only stood in the way of making progress but actively worked to protect for-profit colleges that were scamming borrowers and hard working people in Washington state just trying to get ahead and get an education.
**[Our students deserve better than the DeVos/Smiley approach to education that puts profits over students. Will you chip in $5 right now to help fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46440815/350263399/168247807?refcode=pm_em_220612_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTNmZTEwNi03NmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BWW7CaCxpCoaHERjGWA20lmulKtMCucK9YYV9VAmiR4=)**
Prioritizing for-profit colleges that have outright scammed Washington state student loan borrowers is just the tip of the iceberg. The DeVos/Smiley approach to education also includes vouchering our schools and targeting LGBTQ+ kids. We fought hard to stand up against DeVos before, which is why it’s so important we don’t let her candidate flip this seat.
**[Contribute now to help protect this seat and make sure our students have an advocate for them in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46440816/350263400/168247807?refcode=pm_em_220612_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTNmZTEwNi03NmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BWW7CaCxpCoaHERjGWA20lmulKtMCucK9YYV9VAmiR4=)**
Thanks for your support,

Patty Murray

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46440817/350263401/168247807?refcode=pm_em_220612_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTNmZTEwNi03NmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BWW7CaCxpCoaHERjGWA20lmulKtMCucK9YYV9VAmiR4=)****

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: Remembering the Pulse shooting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
body:
Team —

Today marks the 6-year anniversary of the Pulse shooting, one of the deadliest mass shootings in American history. We’re still facing a rising tide of hate-fuelled violence today.

This heinous attack against the LGBTQ+ community led to the deaths of 49 people and injuries for more than 50 others. Families shattered, futures gone, all because of one person’s hatred.

And new attacks on the LGBTQ+ community remind us of the need for strong allies who will protect LGBTQ+ rights and lives.

Today, we need to honor the memories of those lost, and recommit ourselves to allyship and action. No one should face hatred, hostility, or violence because of who they are or who they love.

After the tragedy at Pulse, I called for a special session to pass gun safety legislation. Republicans refused to take action. And when Republicans didn’t want to fund a Pulse Memorial, I fought back and
worked alongside my colleagues to secure funding for this incredibly important project.

In Florida, we’ve made progress in preventing gun violence. But we need to pass federal laws to prevent another Pulse, another Parkland, or another Uvalde.

In Congress, I’m going to fight for legislation that ends gun violence and protects LGBTQ+ people in Florida and across the country.

As a State Representative, I never wavered in supporting victims and survivors in the wake of Pulse. As your Congressman, I’ll never waver in the fight against gun violence and the fight against hate.

In Remembrance,
Jared Moskowitz

Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
Jared Moskowitz for Congress
PO Box 8784
Coral Springs, FL 33065
United States

name: Deb McGrath
subject: What I’m thinking about on Women Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
A lesson I’ll take with me to Washington:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46440946/350264637/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.5cc70e8a-79ea-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.5cc70e8a-79ea-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2M3MGU4YS03OWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4qdgKg1zOt3opK7kgO7zmxJjumfKDqng6WPIo3ZborQ=) Peter -

Women have served our country from the beginning, like in the Revolutionary War when women were integral to America’s intelligence operations. But it wasn’t until this day in 1948 that women were first allowed to serve in the regular and reserve armed forces in peacetime.

Women’s contributions to our nation’s safety and security have often gone overlooked and underappreciated. **As a veteran myself, I’m so proud that Wisconsin is one of the 14 states that celebrates today as Women Veterans Day.**

Today, I’m thinking about all the Army taught me, and I have one lesson in particular, I’d like to share with you: **that in the face of whatever obstacle is in front of us, we never give up.**

The Army provided me opportunities to develop leadership and courage. I volunteered for challenging assignments, and as a Captain, held a command position in the 8th Army, stationed in the Republic of Korea. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46440947/350264638/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.5cc70e8a-79ea-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.5cc70e8a-79ea-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2M3MGU4YS03OWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4qdgKg1zOt3opK7kgO7zmxJjumfKDqng6WPIo3ZborQ=) _Picture of me on the DMZ - the only woman in leadership_ Early on in my career, I volunteered for parachute training to expand my opportunities for service. On our first jump, I was the only woman in a class of 140, **and the sergeants selected me to be first out of the door.**

I made it safely down, but as our unit counted off, we found we were one member short. One soldier had suffered a malfunction during the jump and was unconscious as he fell to the ground - thankfully, with his parachute open. We located our missing soldier and he lived. The last thing I wanted to do was get on the aircraft and jump again.

But our training had to continue. We jumped again that day, and then the next, and the next until we completed the course. Over my five years of service, and throughout the rest of my life, that lesson would serve me well. **Leadership takes courage and risk. Serve through example and empowerment. Never give up.

Peter, those are lessons I’ll bring to my service in Congress.** I’ll work tirelessly to deliver solutions to the real problems facing families in Wisconsin and across the country. I’ll refuse to give up in the face of partisan logjams or Republican obstruction. I’ll do whatever it takes to make this country better for all of us. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46440948/350264639/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.5cc70e8a-79ea-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.5cc70e8a-79ea-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2M3MGU4YS03OWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4qdgKg1zOt3opK7kgO7zmxJjumfKDqng6WPIo3ZborQ=) However, the GOP has already targeted this race as a top pick-up opportunity, and our opponent has powerful far-right supporters behind him. I know I can’t win against them on my own.

clean_body: A lesson I’ll take with me to Washington: | = Peter - Women have served our country from the beginning, like in the Revolutionary War when women were integral to America’s intelligence operations. But it wasn’t until this day in 1948 that women were first allowed to serve in the regular and reserve armed forces in peacetime. Women’s contributions to our nation’s safety and security have often gone overlooked and underappreciated. As a veteran myself, I’m so proud that Wisconsin is one of the 14 states that celebrates today as Women Veterans Day. Today, I’m thinking about all the Army taught me, and I have one lesson in particular, I’d like to share with you: that in the face of whatever obstacle is in front of us, we never give up. The Army provided me opportunities to develop leadership and courage. I volunteered for challenging assignments, and as a Captain, held a command position in the 8th Army, stationed in the Republic of Korea. = Picture of me on the DMZ - the only woman in leadership Early on in my career, I volunteered for parachute training to expand my opportunities for service. On our first jump, I was the only woman in a class of 140, and the sergeants selected me to be first out of the door. I made it safely down, but as our unit counted off, we found we were one member short. One soldier had suffered a malfunction during the jump and was unconscious as he fell to the ground - thankfully, with his parachute open. We located our missing soldier and he lived. The last thing I wanted to do was get on the aircraft and jump again. But our training had to continue. We jumped again that day, and then the next, and the next until we completed the course. Over my five years of service, and throughout the rest of my life, that lesson would serve me well. Leadership takes courage and risk. Serve through example and empowerment. Never give up. Fellow Conservative,

**I have bad news. You 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have broken a 2-year support streak.**

I am so disappointed. You seemed like such a great Republican supporter. And now that Republicans are on the verge of winning back the House Majority, we need you more than ever.

**[Will you renew for 2022 and become a Sustaining Member of our Republican team one more time? That's why it's so important you renew your 2022 Republican Membership, Fellow Conservative! **[Please make your commitment by 12 AM](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcpbomlo4c51jpf33jfu4dhrgg4ssebqsrv1i1lo_rp22sh2s8i66pb5c1im6o74c3h2bs "Please make your commitment by 12AM") **and give Republicans the help they need to fight the Democrats' big bucks.

name: Our Revolution
subject: we are taking on Trump’s criminal conspiracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Last night’s hearings confirmed what we already knew — Donald Trump led a criminal conspiracy to overturn the 2020 election, stop the peaceful transfer of power through violence, and end fair elections in America.

Trump and the criminals who collaborated with him like Marjorie Taylor Greene, Jim Jordan, and Lauren Boebert never stopped trying to undermine democracy.

That’s why Our Revolution didn’t wait until this week to challenge Trump’s criminal ambitions to seize power.

Our members have filed courageous legal challenges in court and we’re pressuring Secretaries of State to do their job and enforce the Constitution, which bars insurrectionists from running for office. We’re demanding action by protesting outside the offices of insurrectionists and state election officials TODAY.

Peter Willis, pitch in now to help turn these hearings into concrete consequences that take criminal insurrectionists out of power. While corporate Democrats were asleep at the wheel, we’ve been doing the work. Trump is staging a hostile takeover of our democracy, and there’s no time to waste. ( https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5943?source=OR_EM_FR_12MO_20220612_1_4&t=1008&akid=3028%2E5885482%2EGij42s)

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

CHIP IN $27 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5946?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MO_20220612_1_4&t=1011&akid=3028%2E5885482%2EGij42s)

CHIP IN $250 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5948?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MO_20220612_1_4&t=1013&akid=3028%2E5885482%2EGij42s)

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5943?source=OR_EM_FR_12MO_20220612_1_4%7D&t=1015&akid=3028%2E5885482%2EGij42s

While last night’s hearing was compelling, Congress only has the power to investigate and expose – it has no power to prosecute or punish.

State election officials, like Secretaries of State, do have that power. That’s where we’ve put our focus.

Under Section 3 of the 14th Amendment, state election officials are obligated to disqualify any office holder who “engage[s] in insurrection or rebellion against the [United States], or give aid or comfort to [our] enemies.”

On behalf of our 1 million supporters nationwide, Our Revolution is doing the work to fight back to defend our country from fascism. Are you with us? ( https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5943?source=OR_EM_FR_12MO_20220612_1_4&t=1016&akid=3028%2E5885482%2EGij42s)

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

name: Brady
subject: it’s my 8th birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14607?t=1007&amount=8&akid=4119%2E3611125%2EvK2SGp ]Brady & Tim at theme park

Hey there, it’s Brady.

My dad is running to be the next Senator from Ohio. I think it’s pretty
cool he gets to go to so many different places and talk to new people.

Today is my 8th birthday and to celebrate, my Dad took a day off from his
campaign to take me to ride roller coasters. It was a lot of fun and he
told me he will win his race if he has a bunch of friends who cheer him on
and help him raise a lot of money.

So since it’s my birthday my Dad said he’d help me send this email to his
friends like you. Because one of the other things I really want for my 8th
birthday is for my Dad to win his race and be Ohio’s Senator.

My Dad said he’ll put a big blue button at the bottom so you can click it
to give him $8 for my 8th birthday. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14607?t=1008&amount=8&akid=4119%2E3611125%2EvK2SGp ]So, will you please click the
button so my Dad wins his race and helps Ohio. Then this would be the best
birthday EVER!!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14607?t=1009&amount=8&akid=4119%2E3611125%2EvK2SGp ]Donate $8

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14607?t=1010&amount=25&akid=4119%2E3611125%2EvK2SGp ]Other Amount

Oh also, we have a family competition to see whose email can raise the
most money so please help me win!!

Brady

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Put up or shut up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2FO0f4FGqi652vpjR0XErwnLZgUD80zKD&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
For decades, Republicans have stood on the sidelines - resolved to inaction - as countless Americans were killed by gun violence.
This year, the national numbers of victims from this devastation are on track to break records. And yet the Republicans continue to defend unfettered access to weapons of war. Over the last few weeks alone, these weapons were purchased legally and used to murder people shopping at a grocery store. They were used to tear apart the bodies of children - beyond their parents' recognition - as they huddled in their classroom.
Year after year, these same elected Republicans have blocked everything from expanded background checks to red flag laws to limits on high-capacity magazines. All were common sense policies offered up by Democrats with overwhelming public support, and all were blocked because the Republican Party is bought, paid for, and owned by the gun lobby.
How much longer will Republican gridlock on guns persist? How many more lives will it take? **It really is _put up or shut up_ time for the Republican Party. Too many lives have been lost due to their cowardice and obstruction.**
For as long as gun violence has plagued our nation, Democrats have had _solutions_. All it will take is a meaningful number of Republicans to get off the sidelines, rise above mere thoughts and prayers, and _act_.
**If you 're as angry as I am, and if you're more resolved than ever to force the GOP to act on gun violence, then I am asking you to sign this urgent petition: [Add your name immediately to demand the Republican Party STOP blocking common sense reforms to prevent gun violence in America.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-june-gun-safety-petition?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1195-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-june-gun-safety-petition%3Fcode%3Djtk1195-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
