clean_body: Friend, For decades, Republicans have stood on the sidelines - resolved to inaction - as countless Americans were killed by gun violence. This year, the national numbers of victims from this devastation are on track to break records. And yet the Republicans continue to defend unfettered access to weapons of war. Over the last few weeks alone, these weapons were purchased legally and used to murder people shopping at a grocery store. They were used to tear apart the bodies of children - beyond their parents' recognition - as they huddled in their classroom. Year after year, these same elected Republicans have blocked everything from expanded background checks to red flag laws to limits on high-capacity magazines. All were common sense policies offered up by Democrats with overwhelming public support, and all were blocked because the Republican Party is bought, paid for, and owned by the gun lobby. How much longer will Republican gridlock on guns persist? How many more lives will it take? It really is put up or shut up time for the Republican Party. Too many lives have been lost due to their cowardice and obstruction. For as long as gun violence has plagued our nation, Democrats have had solutions. All it will take is a meaningful number of Republicans to get off the sidelines, rise above mere thoughts and prayers, and act. If you 're as angry as I am, and if you're more resolved than ever to force the GOP to act on gun violence, then I am asking you to sign this urgent petition: Thank you, Dick

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: 45,000 lives
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Last week we placed 45,000 flowers on the National Mall outside the Capitol in Washington, D.C.
#

Friends -
Last week we placed 45,000 flowers on the National Mall outside the Capitol in Washington, D.C.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june22.JkdLIw&refcode=em220612-1-15&t=1&akid=2133%2E3935704%2E9V7TNe)
One for every life lost to gun violence in 2020.
When I stood among the flowers, I imagined 45,000 beautiful lives stolen by gun violence.
I imagined 45,000 empty seats at a kitchen table.
I imagined 45,000 dreams never achieved.
But I also imagined the day Congress finally takes action that we know will save lives.
We have come such a long way since starting our work together almost 10 years ago. Back then, campaigning on gun violence prevention was unthinkable.
Today, we know it’s a winning issue.
And if we keep fighting, Congress is either going to take action, or people across the country will elect a Congress that will.
But we can’t keep our progress without your help. So today, I am asking.
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Giffords to help us continue the fight to change our gun laws and save lives? I cannot do this alone. Please make today the day you contribute to the cause.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june22.JkdLIw&refcode=em220612-1-15&t=2&akid=2133%2E3935704%2E9V7TNe)

| | | Team, There’s too much at stake for us to be timid in this election. **Democrats have not done enough with the presidency and majorities in the House and Senate.** Big, bold ideas are needed to move us toward justice. | Peter,

With the November midterm elections getting closer by the day, it’s more important than ever to join the fight to keep Georgia blue.

The 2020 elections came down to the wire with narrow Democratic victories. So, we have no margin for error this time around., There is so much on the line: voting rights, reproductive rights, and our democracy itself are at risk. It’s never been more important than ever to contribute to the fight and keep Republicans from gaining control of Congress.

name: Sara (personal)
subject: This is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Rodriguez for Wisconsin
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-rodriguez-gun-violence [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-rodriguez-gun-violence]
Peter—
Across our communities, gun violence takes different forms. It’s an issue that links the rural, urban, and suburban areas of our state. What they share in common is the fear and trauma that sets in after every devasting event.
As a mother with children in both middle and high school, I know the dread parents feel in the pit of their stomachs every time there is a school shooting. Our children have the right to feel safe in their classrooms and in their homes.
Like so many of you, I am angered by the inaction of Wisconsin's leaders and their refusal to take common sense steps to protect our schools, our children and our communities.
In 2019, Governor Evers called a special session of the legislature to address gun violence in Wisconsin. Republicans gaveled out in less than 1 minute. And since that time, Wisconsin's children and communities have paid the price for their inaction.
Right now, in Wisconsin, guns are the leading cause of death in children and teens. Take a moment to think about that.
I'm a scientist and a public health professional. So, I follow the numbers and the facts to define and solve problems. And the CDC numbers on gun violence in Wisconsin are staggering:
*
70%
of
female
intimate
partner
homicide
victims
in
Wisconsin
are
killed
with
a
gun
*
Between
2011
and
2020,
the
rate
of
gun
deaths
in
Wisconsin
increased
59%,
compared
to
33%
nationwide,
and
*
The
rate
of
gun
homicides
in
Wisconsin
increased
189
%,
compared
to
70%
nationally
The numbers also point us to a solution. Look, we know what works. We know what we need to do to reduce gun violence in our homes, in our schools and in our communities. We just need leaders with the political will and courage to act.
In Wisconsin, safe, responsible gun ownership is the standard. I reject the false choice that we either have to care about the Second Amendment or care about our kids’ safety.
Sportsmen and other responsible gun owners in Wisconsin – from all backgrounds and across the political spectrum – agree that responsible gun ownership is consistent with common sense gun safety reforms. Reforms that the majority of Wisconsinites and Americans support and are calling for in this moment.
We cannot continue to be complacent about gun violence. We are all being called to act NOW.
In the state Assembly, I introduced and co-sponsored legislation to address gun violence and fund intervention programs that would make our communities safer.
As Lieutenant Governor I will never stop fighting for common sense gun reforms including background checks, closing the loophole to keep guns out of the hands of people who have committed domestic abuse, safe storage laws, and keeping ghost guns off the streets.
There's so much at stake here. We cannot let this moment pass...again. Will you help me continue advocating for common sense gun safety reforms that save lives in Wisconsin? I cannot do this alone. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-rodriguez-gun-violence]
Thank you,
Sara

name: Tom Pyle, AEA
subject: Sign this petition to end Biden’s war on oil
body:
| | | [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkL1qxDAQhJ_G7mQkWaufwkUgXHcpQiClkVe7dyY-28gyIW8fXV4gMM0sAzPfpiFhigrbedBSa2mVVsZ4kJ0yEzsTJlLOTwDQGBkXyqXLtJ_TMmNcSzy-eMtIHW6P9j5YxglVcDG5lMiRT4GcApvAK5Cs28_reI3zMq-3t_igIRce8zFGqoqCVsq3n9EKpYXWo2qX4V7KfjT9S6MvVQfhmamLK6WtPCvrzSafrMde9NyjMMwkfA8oZGRlEEn6ADXmA0dtLQierBcmkBV1GggKrKQOxHVv01-O7aw0I25P9_r-cdEeDLR5SPv3vCzzYV19w-1RGf6Qyz8Iv-IObI0)
---
Friend, Within his first week in office, President Biden signed an executive order temporarily suspending new oil and gas leases on federal lands — _Now they’ve taken anti-oil to the next level._ Biden’s Interior Department just **_canceled_** a ONE MILLION ACRE OIL LEASE SALE**** in Alaska, along with TWO MORE OIL LEASE SALES in the Gulf of Mexico as Americans face painfully high prices at the pump. **America is experiencing the highest gas prices ever in history. Gas prices have soared by 50% nationwide over the past year. The American Energy Alliance (AEA) has drafted a petition in response to this attack on American energy prices.** [**Please Sign our UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY Petition:**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkL1qxDAQhJ_G7mQkWaufwkUgXHcpQiClkVe7dyY-28gyIW8fXV4gMM0sAzPfpiFhigrbedBSa2mVVsZ4kJ0yEzsTJlLOTwDQGBkXyqXLtJ_TMmNcSzy-eMtIHW6P9j5YxglVcDG5lMiRT4GcApvAK5Cs28_reI3zMq-3t_igIRce8zFGqoqCVsq3n9EKpYXWo2qX4V7KfjT9S6MvVQfhmamLK6WtPCvrzSafrMde9NyjMMwkfA8oZGRlEEn6ADXmA0dtLQierBcmkBV1GggKrKQOxHVv01-O7aw0I25P9_r-cdEeDLR5SPv3vCzzYV19w-1RGf6Qyz8Iv-IObI0)
---
[**Sign The Unleash American Energy Petition Now!**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkL1qxDAQhJ_G7mQkWaufwkUgXHcpQiClkVe7dyY-28gyIW8fXV4gMM0sAzPfpiFhigrbedBSa2mVVsZ4kJ0yEzsTJlLOTwDQGBkXyqXLtJ_TMmNcSzy-eMtIHW6P9j5YxglVcDG5lMiRT4GcApvAK5Cs28_reI3zMq-3t_igIRce8zFGqoqCVsq3n9EKpYXWo2qX4V7KfjT9S6MvVQfhmamLK6WtPCvrzSafrMde9NyjMMwkfA8oZGRlEEn6ADXmA0dtLQierBcmkBV1GggKrKQOxHVv01-O7aw0I25P9_r-cdEeDLR5SPv3vCzzYV19w-1RGf6Qyz8Iv-IObI0)
---
Average gas prices in the U.S. have reached new record-highs thanks to policies enacted by the Biden administration. The national average price of regular gasoline hit a new record of $4.60 on Thursday. Former Trump EPA advisor Steve Milloy said: _"I blame Biden for all lack of production ...**They will find any excuse to not drill**.”_ **The price you are paying at the pump is a direct result of restrictions placed on energy producers. Not allowing them to produce enough energy needed to keep our economy moving has resulted in this skyrocketing of prices for all consumers.** Together, we must send an urgent message to the Biden administration, letting them know we will not stand for this any longer. That is why AEA has drafted this petition to end the gas price crisis. **_AEA is on the frontlines fighting everyday for an abundant, reliable and affordable energy future._**_We are asking for your support now to help bring gas prices down_** _— Please sign the UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY petition today._** [**Tell****Joe Biden how we, the American people, feel about his administration’s direct assault on energy prices by signing our UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY Petition now.**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkL1qxDAQhJ_G7mQkWaufwkUgXHcpQiClkVe7dyY-28gyIW8fXV4gMM0sAzPfpiFhigrbedBSa2mVVsZ4kJ0yEzsTJlLOTwDQGBkXyqXLtJ_TMmNcSzy-eMtIHW6P9j5YxglVcDG5lMiRT4GcApvAK5Cs28_reI3zMq-3t_igIRce8zFGqoqCVsq3n9EKpYXWo2qX4V7KfjT9S6MvVQfhmamLK6WtPCvrzSafrMde9NyjMMwkfA8oZGRlEEn6ADXmA0dtLQierBcmkBV1GggKrKQOxHVv01-O7aw0I25P9_r-cdEeDLR5SPv3vCzzYV19w-1RGf6Qyz8Iv-IObI0)
---
[**Sign The Unleash American Energy Petition Now!**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkL1qxDAQhJ_G7mQkWaufwkUgXHcpQiClkVe7dyY-28gyIW8fXV4gMM0sAzPfpiFhigrbedBSa2mVVsZ4kJ0yEzsTJlLOTwDQGBkXyqXLtJ_TMmNcSzy-eMtIHW6P9j5YxglVcDG5lMiRT4GcApvAK5Cs28_reI3zMq-3t_igIRce8zFGqoqCVsq3n9EKpYXWo2qX4V7KfjT9S6MvVQfhmamLK6WtPCvrzSafrMde9NyjMMwkfA8oZGRlEEn6ADXmA0dtLQierBcmkBV1GggKrKQOxHVv01-O7aw0I25P9_r-cdEeDLR5SPv3vCzzYV19w-1RGf6Qyz8Iv-IObI0)
---
With your support, we will keep fighting against the politicians and special interests intent on implementing a never-ending list of federal fees, taxes, and barriers to entry that will lead to further continuation of record-high fuel prices. **[Please sign the petition now.](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkL1qxDAQhJ_G7mQkWaufwkUgXHcpQiClkVe7dyY-28gyIW8fXV4gMM0sAzPfpiFhigrbedBSa2mVVsZ4kJ0yEzsTJlLOTwDQGBkXyqXLtJ_TMmNcSzy-eMtIHW6P9j5YxglVcDG5lMiRT4GcApvAK5Cs28_reI3zMq-3t_igIRce8zFGqoqCVsq3n9EKpYXWo2qX4V7KfjT9S6MvVQfhmamLK6WtPCvrzSafrMde9NyjMMwkfA8oZGRlEEn6ADXmA0dtLQierBcmkBV1GggKrKQOxHVv01-O7aw0I25P9_r-cdEeDLR5SPv3vCzzYV19w-1RGf6Qyz8Iv-IObI0)** Thank You, Tom Pyle
President American Energy Alliance
---
[**Sign The Unleash American Energy Petition Now!**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkL1qxDAQhJ_G7mQkWaufwkUgXHcpQiClkVe7dyY-28gyIW8fXV4gMM0sAzPfpiFhigrbedBSa2mVVsZ4kJ0yEzsTJlLOTwDQGBkXyqXLtJ_TMmNcSzy-eMtIHW6P9j5YxglVcDG5lMiRT4GcApvAK5Cs28_reI3zMq-3t_igIRce8zFGqoqCVsq3n9EKpYXWo2qX4V7KfjT9S6MvVQfhmamLK6WtPCvrzSafrMde9NyjMMwkfA8oZGRlEEn6ADXmA0dtLQierBcmkBV1GggKrKQOxHVv01-O7aw0I25P9_r-cdEeDLR5SPv3vCzzYV19w-1RGf6Qyz8Iv-IObI0)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: What do you say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |

name: Tiara Parker, Pulse Survivor
subject: I Survived Pulse & Now I'm Fighting to Change America's Gun Laws...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter,

Six years ago today, I was celebrating at Pulse Nightclub — my little cousin Akyra had just graduated from high school, third in her class. She was set to attend college in the Fall on a basketball scholarship. But that night, our celebration turned into a nightmare when Akyra, 20 strangers, and I got as close as possible in a tiny bathroom stall and prayed that our lives would not be taken.

I was shot, not only in my side, but I also sustained a grazed hip, burned back, and injuries to my right arm and legs. I was lucky — not everyone was fortunate enough to live. My cousin, Akyra Murray, was shot and murdered in the second deadliest mass shooting in American history.

That’s why I joined Pride Fund to End Gun Violence as a member of the Board of Advisors. Everyone can make a difference, and I’ve chosen to take my anger, my frustration, my pain and dedicate it to changing our country’s inadequate gun laws through political advocacy. I’m asking you to make a donation to Pride Fund. Can you pitch in $49 to honor the 49 victims, including my cousin Akyra? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pf-tiara-6years?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes

The shooter brutally took the lives of Akyra and 48 others with an assault weapon and large-capacity magazines, weapons that are too easily accessible to people in this country. Despite the overwhelming majority of Americans favoring a ban on both of these military-grade weapons, Congress and Republican-controlled State legislatures across the country refuse to address these concerns because it would mean forfeiting their NRA blood money. This needs to change.

That’s why Pride Fund’s work is so important. Our mission is to turn tragedy into action through a focus on commonsense gun safety reforms like enacting background checks and restricting access to assault weapons and large-capacity magazines.

We know there are commonsense measures that Congress could pass today that would save lives - they just need the courage to stand up and do what’s right. And if they won’t, it’s up to us to elect leaders who will.

I hope you’ll join me in my fight to help change our nation’s gun laws by donating $49, or whatever you can, in honor of the 49 victims taken too early at Pulse 6 years ago today.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pf-tiara-6years?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes

Tiara Parker

Pride Fund to End Gun Violence

Board of Advisors

DONATE- https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pf-tiara-6years?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes

To help us grow this movement, will you please forward this email to 2 friends to get them involved?

Not subscribed to Pride Fund's emails? Sign up here. https://act.myngp.com/Forms/-7357247923588756736

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Copyright © 2016 Pride Fund to End Gun Violence, All rights reserved. |
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/oRJoM7Un_90phvQVAKmQdVbXMaewU5Y7nJUSo_djWHg=/kqaiFnUKB2nWK_5p0Wx3dlR76sxyugzZGrIcRTpUk1o=.

Pride Fund to End Gun Violence
PO Box 32377
Washington DC 20007 United States

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEAN PATRICK MALONEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
[**TRUMP: MY SUPPORTERS WILL BE "HAPPY" WITH MY 2024 DECISION**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46442726/350272607/91184225?refcode=20220612_em_fr_b1_spm_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODZmZGY5ZS04MmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TRPzjtL2pdmepxxDllkQTam6AfI_iWitOhDv6Bg0k2o=) [_**Derek, this is the most important ask I have ever made of you. As Democratic House Chairman, I’m organizing a HISTORIC response -- $7,371 raised before midnight -- to protect our Democrats and make Trump’s plan BACKFIRE. We all know a tied Senate isn’t working. Legislation that can make a real difference — on voting rights, paid family leave, climate change, abortion rights, and more — has stalled out with seemingly no hope of passing.
This is a moment that calls for leaders with the moral courage to do what is right and just. We need someone who understands the urgency of this moment and is willing to act.
Cheri Beasley will be that leader. She has dedicated her life to the relentless pursuit of justice for our families, and she understands that the 50/50 tie in the Senate is failing us right now.
So yes, your $3 donation today can make real, transformational change in the U.S. Senate by putting us a step closer to victory in November.

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: laughable
body:
Admiral Mike Franken is running for Senate to defeat Chuck Grassley in Iowa. Split a donation between his campaign and CommonGood today and do your part to protect our Democratic Senate majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvafranken?refcode=20220612_CGVA_Franken]
Derek,
Well, that didn’t take long. Less than an hour after I was declared the Democratic nominee for Senate in Iowa, the attacks from Chuck Grassley began:
*
“The
most
liberal
nominee
in
Iowa
Senate
history”
*
“Radical”
*
“Socialist”
Gotta love it! Chuck Grassley doesn’t know what to say about me. He’s never faced an opponent like me before. I’m his political nightmare, so he’s just throwing cow pies at the wall and hoping something sticks.
Calling me “radical” is laughable when Chuck Grassley supports a complete ban on abortion and letting literally anyone buy an AR-15 without even a background check.
But there’s one attack that I absolutely won’t take lying down, and that’s Chuck Grassley attacking me for serving our country for 36 years in the U.S. Navy.
Grassley is already trying to say that because I enlisted in the military at age 19, because my deployments meant that my family had to move from state-to-state and country-to-country... that I’m not an Iowan anymore.
Chuck Grassley wants to pretend that I wasn’t raised in rural, northwest Iowa. He ignores the enormous sacrifices that my family – my wife and my kids – made to allow me to serve in the Navy.
Grassley’s attacks denigrate every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, spend holidays away from each other, and be absent from life’s big events like weddings and the birth of a child.
And if Chuck Grassley thinks that I will stand silent while he says that every Iowan who puts on our country’s uniform stops being an Iowan... he’s delusional.
These are the kinds of attacks I’m going to be up against. Nasty stuff from Chuck Grassley, Mitch McConnell, and the Fox ‘Entertainment’ News propaganda network.
There’s one reason why: The GOP is scared. They’ve seen the polls, and they know that if we defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, Democrats are guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority.
In order to fight back, we need to raise another $100,000 before midnight tomorrow, but the only way we’ll hit our goal and send Grassley packing is if grassroots donors like you give right now:
Please, can I count on you to split a donation of $25 or more right now between my campaign and CommonGood – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvafranken?refcode=20220612_CGVA_Franken]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87591/images/frankenimage.jpeg]DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvafranken?refcode=20220612_CGVA_Franken&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvafranken?refcode=20220612_CGVA_Franken&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvafranken?refcode=20220612_CGVA_Franken&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvafranken?refcode=20220612_CGVA_Franken&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvafranken?refcode=20220612_CGVA_Franken&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgvafranken?refcode=20220612_CGVA_Franken]
These attacks against me are ridiculous, but we cannot let them go unanswered.
Thank you for being a crucial part of this phase of our campaign,
Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.)
This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

name: Team Beto
subject: Will you help us get our ads on the air?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

The results of this election could come down to just 1 or 2 percent.

That’s why we’re doing everything possible to reach voters across Texas
with Beto’s positive, unifying message. That includes events and
organizing, but it also includes running ads. We’re working on developing
Beto’s first TV ads, and we need to prepare the financial resources to get
them on air.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220612-1.ni1Sn6&refcode=ema20220612-193597&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=193597%2E444211%2Ex9S9FJ ]Please, will you make a $3 contribution right now to
help us create and launch Beto’s ads? With 20 media markets across Texas,
we need to have the resources necessary to reach voters in every part of
the state.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220612-1.ni1Sn6&refcode=ema20220612-193597&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=193597%2E444211%2Ex9S9FJ ]Contribute $3

We're preparing for attack ads against Beto to flood Texas. Abbott already
spent $4 million on ads earlier this year and is planning to spend over
$100 million before Election Day.

We might be outspent by Greg Abbott's corporate mega-donors in this
election, but we know we will win by coming together, writing no one off,
competing for every vote, and being strategic with our spending.

From video production to getting our message in front of Texans, ads
aren't cheap. We need the resources to make sure millions of Texans see
them. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220612-1.ni1Sn6&refcode=ema20220612-193597&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=193597%2E444211%2Ex9S9FJ ]Pitch in $3 right now to help us get our ads in
front of voters.

Thank you for helping us spread Beto’s positive vision for Texas.

More soon,

Team Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=193597%2E444211%2Ex9S9FJ

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: PA-17 Race Alert
subject: We need your help to cut through the noise.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Pennsylvania’s 17th District is one of the most competitive races in the country, and Chris Deluzio is only three points ahead of his radical opponent.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46442939/350273752/1383944506?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.12_b1_pa17ra_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGYzMmI4OC04NmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxC4CcAvfsb8cnPX3XEuP3-OYY5sm06cWyI6ZNOo93U=) Hi Derek –

We only need a minute of your time: Right now, Pennsylvania’s 17th District is one of the most competitive races in the country. **According to recent polling, Chris is just _three points_ ahead of his radical opponent, but _sixteen percent_ of voters are still undecided.**

The other side knows this too, which is why they’re spending big – _**nearly $5 million**_ – to try to sway these undecided voters before they can hear Chris’s positive message of fighting for our common good.

If Republican leader Kevin McCarthy gets his hands on the Speaker’s gavel, he’ll enact a **pro-corporation, anti-worker agenda** that will hurt hard working Americans and send our jobs overseas.

_**We can’t let that happen.**_

**[Derek, western Pennsylvanians deserve a leader like Chris who will fight for our common good in Washington. clean_body: Pennsylvania’s 17th District is one of the most competitive races in the country, and Chris Deluzio is only three points ahead of his radical opponent. | = Hi Derek – We only need a minute of your time: Right now, Pennsylvania’s 17th District is one of the most competitive races in the country. According to recent polling, Chris is just three points ahead of his radical opponent, but sixteen percent of voters are still undecided. The other side knows this too, which is why they’re spending big – nearly $5 million – to try to sway these undecided voters before they can hear Chris’s positive message of fighting for our common good. If Republican leader Kevin McCarthy gets his hands on the Speaker’s gavel, he’ll enact a pro-corporation, anti-worker agenda that will hurt hard working Americans and send our jobs overseas. We can’t let that happen. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. = | = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. | Did you know that Republicans only need to flip **5 seats** across the country to take back control of Congress? We’re right on the edge, and that’s why we’re working to flip this district _**RED**_ to _**BLUE**_ – we need to defend our Democratic majority in the House.

**The good news is that thanks to Michigan's redistricting, we have a brand new district that CAN flip, and we’re going to flip it. clean_body: The good news is that this district CAN flip, and we’re going to flip it. | = | Did you know that Republicans only need to flip 5 seats across the country to take back control of Congress? We’re right on the edge, and that’s why we’re working to flip this district RED to BLUE – we need to defend our Democratic majority in the House. The good news is that thanks to Michigan's redistricting, we have a brand new district that CAN flip, and we’re going to flip it. = | = | = As I talk to folks across the district, I hear a similar message again and again: people are ready for a change. They’re ready for a government that works for us. They’re ready for a Representative whose first priority is the families and workers of the district, not special interest groups. Experts agree that we can flip this district, but more than that, we must — in order to keep the House blue. If you agree, = | | | = | = | = | = | = Looking forward to making change with you, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Hillary Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | =

Since last week’s primary election, we’ve continued closing the gap. | | |
---
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0O2g3IeUKQikAwOoSJOJAAdd9FZ0L0zxG-H0-vG_V5OdmlBXubXlKodPvNDbnATthjt09EETVgAUIMQkhI2a7wQc41lcVq95rV26YIEJqa0ckmfBEc0tWjBxmTUsUmoa3d48KaX-bsfG0ixorBYocLfGpyW8QpnTu7miEoRU-42Tqrh_os37G5nfq_CvR_xTItETyJW9b9c3pVZE-kKcKC1MmAMYhQqIodSf8iL0gapv_/3mu/1BULFuxNRv2nMvIOcB_zBQ/h0/SJR6U1wfitlhq09Xa1UrxRX4pi4nT_snVO9qrGo3qZo)
| | Dear Peter, As ballots continue to be counted from last week’s primary election, we’ve continued closing the gap between second and third place. We finished election night seemingly down 4,000 votes. But the ballots counted since then have narrowed our gap. Yesterday, the Board of Elections released updated data showing that our campaign is now under 1,000 votes away from reaching the general election. Below are comparisons of our results most recently reported (on top) versus those from election night on Tuesday (underneath). We know that these patterns of impunity will continue until we finally end the careers of the career and dynasty politicians who enable them. clean_body: Since last week’s primary election, we’ve continued closing the gap. | | | | | Dear Peter, As ballots continue to be counted from last week’s primary election, we’ve continued closing the gap between second and third place. We finished election night seemingly down 4,000 votes. But the ballots counted since then have narrowed our gap. Yesterday, the Board of Elections released updated data showing that our campaign is now under 1,000 votes away from reaching the general election. Below are comparisons of our results most recently reported (on top) versus those from election night on Tuesday (underneath). With at least 180,000 ballots submitted in our race, our current margin is roughly comparable to the under 200 votes by which NRA-backed Democrat Henry Cuellar—relying on Nancy Pelosi’s support—appeared to recently triumph over progressive Jessica Cisneros in the TX-28 race, in which only 50,000 voters participated. We know that these patterns of impunity will continue until we finally end the careers of the career and dynasty politicians who enable them. Thank you for everything you’ve done to support our campaign! Together, we’ve mobilized tens of thousands of people, shifted half a dozen policies in the House, and exposed a critique of continuing corruption suppressed by the press establishment. As an immigrant challenging a corporate oligarch, I’m proud to have punched far above my weight. We couldn’t do it without you! Your voice, Shahid | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . I only have about 10 free minutes this evening, folks. I want to take this time to share what I’ve been up to lately — and [**how your grassroots support makes it all possible**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46443164/350276418/-358470993?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGJkNTA0ZC04YWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2VdPlA7FZtG8Xm2TQeCZ1dFTKAIFQp0nhOwI0G-dcc0=). First, I want to address an issue that is on so many of our minds. It’s important that you know I’m working every day to move forward common-sense, bipartisan gun reform legislation in the Senate. **We _can_ protect innocent lives and constitutional rights at the same time — and I’m optimistic that we can get it done soon.** We’ve also seen our collective activism toward a clean-energy future pay off. I’ve recently led efforts to stop the threat of solar tariffs and boost the solar industry to save and create jobs in New Mexico and across the country. President Biden responded — announcing that he’s suspending solar tariffs for two years and taking steps to strengthen U.S. solar manufacturing. **This is a critical step to building an American-made, clean-energy future and addressing the climate crisis with the urgency it deserves.** On the campaign side, we made incredible gains in the New Mexico primary elections last Tuesday — seeing strong Democratic leaders like red-to-blue congressional candidate Gabe Vasquez, Secretary of State Maggie Toulouse Oliver, and a slate of local candidates move on to their general elections. **Electing Democrats at every single level of government is critical to our people-first agenda — from fighting for federal legislation to expand early childhood education in New Mexico, to protecting abortion rights, to investing in clean energy, to preserving our lands and planet for future generations.** Grassroots support from folks like you who donate to emails just like this one makes all the difference in these efforts. We’re counting on your support to continue my work in the U.S. Senate and elect Democrats up and down the ballot. **I’m almost out of time and have a question for you before I log off: Can you pitch in a donation of $10 or any amount toward our final mid-month fundraising goal of the quarter? name: Adam Schiff
subject: The gravity of the situation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I’ve been thinking a lot lately about the gravity of the situation we’re facing, and I wanted to share some thoughts with you.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=350%2E5257348%2EkiSfqX)
Derek,
I’ve been thinking a lot lately about the gravity of the situation we’re facing, and I wanted to share some thoughts with you.
So much is at stake right now. And there is so much to be done.
Defending democracy. Fighting back against oil industry greed and price gouging. Protecting reproductive rights. Ending the epidemic of gun violence. Stopping Trump and his cronies from regaining power.
Keeping and expanding our Democratic majorities in Congress in a midterm election — where historically the party in power flips.
It’s a lot, and I understand why you might want a break. I get it, really. Way more than you might know. But the important thing is to keep pushing for a better future. And never lose hope.
Republicans might have their dark money groups and the billionaire class in their pockets, but we have an unbeatable force of grassroots activists all across the nation who are fighting for our shared values — you and I are both a part of this team. This amazing team.
We’ve beaten the odds before, and I know we can do it again. clean_body: | I’ve been thinking a lot lately about the gravity of the situation we’re facing, and I wanted to share some thoughts with you. Derek, I’ve been thinking a lot lately about the gravity of the situation we’re facing, and I wanted to share some thoughts with you. So much is at stake right now. And there is so much to be done. Defending democracy. Fighting back against oil industry greed and price gouging. Protecting reproductive rights. Ending the epidemic of gun violence. Stopping Trump and his cronies from regaining power. Keeping and expanding our Democratic majorities in Congress in a midterm election — where historically the party in power flips. It’s a lot, and I understand why you might want a break. I get it, really. Way more than you might know. But the important thing is to keep pushing for a better future. And never lose hope. Republicans might have their dark money groups and the billionaire class in their pockets, but we have an unbeatable force of grassroots activists all across the nation who are fighting for our shared values — you and I are both a part of this team. name: Alex-Padilla.com
subject: Now that the General Election has begun, we are looking for as many people as possible to say they endorse Alex Padilla’s campaign for Senate. Can you add your name?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Now that the general election has begun, our team is hard at work reaching voters all across California and laying the groundwork for victory in November.
We’re going to run a people-powered campaign that addresses the problems people are facing and brings them into the political process all across California.
It’s not going to be easy — there are millions and millions of registered voters in California. But that’s what we have to do, one vote, one supporter, and one endorsement at a time. **And it starts with you:**
[**Can you please personally endorse Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate in California? Now that the general election has begun, we need as many people as possible to stand with Alex.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-emJune22/?source=em220612-1-30&refcode2=847.159979.KJvT8_&akid=847%2E159979%2EKJvT8_)
**[ENDORSE ALEX](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-emJune22/?source=em220612-1-30&refcode2=847.159979.KJvT8_&akid=847%2E159979%2EKJvT8_)**
Beating Alex Padilla is one of California Republicans’ top priorities, because they know if they win a Senate seat in California, it will be almost impossible for Democrats to hold our Senate majority.
That’s why we’re campaigning all across the state to make sure Alex wins this race and remains in the Senate, fighting for California and to protect our democracy.
An important part of that process is getting as many people as possible to say they endorse Alex — especially right now, at the start of the general election. So it would mean a lot if you could add your name today.
[**Can you please personally endorse Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate in California? Now that the general election has begun, we need as many people as possible to stand with Alex.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-emJune22/?source=em220612-1-30&refcode2=847.159979.KJvT8_&akid=847%2E159979%2EKJvT8_)
**[ENDORSE ALEX](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-emJune22/?source=em220612-1-30&refcode2=847.159979.KJvT8_&akid=847%2E159979%2EKJvT8_)**
It might seem like a small action, but something as simple as adding your name to say you support Alex makes a big difference in this race.
Thank you in advance for your support!
\- Team Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=847%2E159979%2EKJvT8_)

** _A Note From Nikki:_** Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. **[Pre-order your signed copy today to have it shipped to you once it launches in clean_body: | | | Friend, November 2022 is critical to our nation's future. But we have a fighting chance because of people like YOU. I want to personally thank you for standing up and supporting Republicans. Your generosity has allowed us to win BIG elections across the country. This is why I am inviting you to join a special group, made up of our most loyal 1% of supporters. The Conservative Coalition Advisory Board will shape how we win elections and save America's future. The Democrats have fought hard, but YOU are fighting harder. Let’s save America. My very best, Nikki Haley | A Note From Nikki: Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. To pre-order your signed copy of "If You Want Something Done..." chip in $45 or more. | | Copyright © 2021 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. name: Fetterman for PA
subject: How to help guarantee a Democratic Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
All eyes will be on the Keystone State this November.
#
Derek,
We want to share something our team thinks about every day 👇
**This Senate seat is gonna be a real toss-up, so saving our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority could all come down to Pennsylvania.** All eyes will be on the Keystone State this November.
Don’t just take our word for it. **CNN has consistently rated Pennsylvania as the #1 Most Likely to Flip Democratic state in the country.** (And we all remember what happened when Pennsylvania flipped the other way in 2016.)
That’s why building support for the long road ahead is so critical _right now._
**[Derek, if we’re going to defend + expand our Democratic Senate majority, we need your help so John can beat Dr. Oz in November. Please, chip in what you can afford today to help us reach our $100,000 mid-month goal.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220612-1?refcode=em20220612-6174&refcode2=6174_434096_b00IN5&akid=6174%2E434096%2Eb00IN5) **
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220612-1?refcode=em20220612-6174&refcode2=6174_434096_b00IN5&akid=6174%2E434096%2Eb00IN5)
Right now, there are a couple Democratic Senators who have single handedly held up urgent legislation over the past year and a half — including legislation that would codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law.
Derek, when we send John to the Senate this November, not only are we nearly guaranteed to maintain our Democratic majority, but we will also add one more Democrat to our side.
This would make John the 51st Democratic YES vote on urgent changes, like passing vital voting rights legislation + abolishing the filibuster.
**We can’t risk losing our Senate majority or that 51st seat, Derek.** There is simply too much on the line.
That’s why we need all hands on deck to help carry our primary momentum through November.
[**_Can you please make a donation of $5 or more today to help us meet our $100,000 mid-month goal? Your support will all but guarantee we send John to the Senate and pass urgently needed Democratic legislation._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220612-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220612-6174&refcode2=6174_434096_b00IN5&akid=6174%2E434096%2Eb00IN5)
**[Donate now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220612-1?refcode=em20220612-6174&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6174_434096_b00IN5&akid=6174%2E434096%2Eb00IN5)**
Thanks for your support, Derek. We wouldn’t be able to do this without online supporters like you.
—Fetterman for PA

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220612-6174-footer&t=1&refcode2=6174_434096_b00IN5&akid=6174%2E434096%2Eb00IN5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=6174%2E434096%2Eb00IN5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=6174%2E434096%2Eb00IN5)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Friend, I’m asking you for $5.
Here’s why: Polls show me neck and neck with Marco Rubio – and, according to The Miami Times, I’m rapidly closing the gap.
I know $5 doesn't sound like much, but that's how we've built the momentum to make our race competitive. When thousands of people like you join our team with even $5, we build a powerful and unstoppable movement.

But the GOP dark-money machine is determined to destroy our momentum and defeat me at any cost, so I’m leaning on this grassroots team again to help flip Florida blue.
**I've set a goal to raise another $20,000 before MIDNIGHT, but we’re still $2,592 short. And at this point in the election, when Rubio and the GOP are launching another round of vicious, nasty attack ads to defeat me, we need all the help we can get.**
In the time that it’s taken you to get to this point in the email, nine people have already donated $5 to join our team, but I’m counting on you to chip in too, friend. name: Greg Stamps
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWlxr36hNe

I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of
their heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm
thrilled to share a digital
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWlxr36hNe

Dear
Friend,

I hear
from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their
heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm thrilled
to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you,
absolutely free: "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the
Rich."

"Tax cuts
for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower
tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy
Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the
federal government?

Hoover
Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical
approach in his commentary, "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts
for the Rich."

Sowell
separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses
real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all
actually lead to greater revenue for the government.

As a
friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to
offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of
charge. Click here to get your free copy of "Trickle Down" Theory
and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Charlie Crist Finance Dept.
subject: If we fail to reach this goal, our chances of defeating Gov. DeSantis will plummet
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
and we’re still falling short! |
---

| | Hi there, it’s Charlie Crist’s finance team.

By now, you’ve probably heard that we set an aggressive fundraising goal of raising $25,000 by midnight on June 15. We’re reaching out to let you know that while we’ve made significant progress toward this goal, we’re not there yet.

**_[To close the gap, we’re asking everyone to pitch in a few dollars by tomorrow at midnight. Can you do that now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46444302/350283061/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220612_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTIwZmNjNy05NGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y6dr_UtszOgzQ-eToYIsHlDOYSpkhKLoPgQZ1x0_peA=)_ If we fail to reach this goal, our chances of defeating Gov. Ron DeSantis will plummet.**

Unlike Gov. DeSantis, Charlie doesn’t rely on right-wing, billionaire donors and their deep pockets. He depends on his incredible grassroots team, and that’s why we're coming to you today.

Make no mistake: Right-wing billionaires are already shelling out big money to steer this election in their favor. So we need to show everyone — including DeSantis — that we have what it takes to defeat his extremist agenda and protect reproductive freedom.

We wouldn’t ask if we didn’t need your help, friend. **_[If you can spare any amount, we know Charlie would be very grateful.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46444303/350283062/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220612_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTIwZmNjNy05NGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y6dr_UtszOgzQ-eToYIsHlDOYSpkhKLoPgQZ1x0_peA=)_**

We profoundly appreciate your support!

— Finance Department, Team Crist **________________________________** Hi there, Charlie Crist here. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46444304/350283063/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220612_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTIwZmNjNy05NGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y6dr_UtszOgzQ-eToYIsHlDOYSpkhKLoPgQZ1x0_peA=)
---
I wanted to write to say thank you for everything you’re doing to help defeat Ron DeSantis. Florida can’t afford another four years of his divisive politics in the governor’s office, and I appreciate your support in this race.

Whether we have a governor who will fight climate change, protect our communities from gun violence, and defend our most precious constitutional rights will depend on the outcome of this election. Governor DeSantis wants to use the governor’s office to advance an extreme, far-right agenda that he thinks will help him win the Republican nomination for president, and we can’t let that happen.

But while he has out-of-state billionaires writing check after check to his campaign, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to pitch in anything you can to help me fight back. **_[If you can, please click here to make a donation to support my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46444305/350283064/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220612_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTIwZmNjNy05NGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y6dr_UtszOgzQ-eToYIsHlDOYSpkhKLoPgQZ1x0_peA=)_**

Thank you again for your support. By working together, I know we can win this race and finally start to build a Florida that works for ALL Floridians.

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---
Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg, FL 33731
United States

name: Dan Farough
subject: 2022 Update: Encouraging signs
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,
You’re probably reading the same headlines I am. But I have some good news for you today. Let's look at Jocelyn's race.
Before I go any further - May was our best grassroots fundraising month, ever . More than 2,000 of you stepped up to make sure we can win this election in November. So don’t think for a second that you’re alone. This, more than anything, gives me hope. There is a powerful movement behind Jocelyn.
But besides your enthusiasm and support for Jocelyn’s campaign, there are other signs that tell me that things are looking up.
* Messaging on Choice: Data shows that an overwhelming majority of Michiganders support a woman's right to choose and furthermore, that Kristina Karamo is too extreme on the issue (she publicly says that anyone who supports a woman’s right to choose “must worship Satan.”) She makes no exceptions for rape or incest. Voters are concerned that she would use the Secretary of State's Office to try and restrict access rather than doing her job.

On Jocelyn: An equally overwhelming majority of Michigan voters support the work that Jocelyn is doing when it comes to motor vehicle services. From adding online services to dropping branch office visits to 20 minutes or less - Jocelyn is focused on results. And when voters realize it, they’ll check the box to keep her in office another four years.

If we make this a contrast between Jocelyn and Karamo – we will win. Ultimately, this election will come down to WHAT’S WORKING or WHAT'S TOO EXTREME. If we continue to make that distinction over and over until Election Day, Jocelyn will be re-elected Secretary of State.
Now’s the time, friend. Join the 2306 supporters who have pitched in to make sure Jocelyn’s campaign can spread this message until Election Day. And if you pitched in last month, consider another contribution this month as well.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sosbenson?refcode=em061122]

Look, we’re all tired. It’s hard to keep up this fight in the face of ongoing extremism and turmoil. But if we keep working - if we stay the course - we’re going to win in November.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sosbenson?refcode=em061122 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sosbenson?refcode=em061122] Thank you for being with us.
Dan Farough
Campaign Chair
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
To unsubscribe, please click here: unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/fqSK2PQg_UCkKErG0V0_Ew2?unsubscribedata=Swu8SiLDSMU7s1BpAGT%2B%2FN%2BE1va4lH49hbC0QmedSoHh0LjltmIw%2F6%2BEO7LRXLLs6WGmiFMhAAWl7DxwxFBPUIdaUGZtvS8jRICaFxKxGg9jw10hqmxV0avy1QPvjqEMXgkwwda8zkd5aXC5RgXRjjhj28dsfuTbsxrvJZGjfe%2B6RNl1M4QGrp%2BgzOMSj%2FnQtOooGxejn84bVzQDhgekb3oaptb5P5%2BgrN48MF5Poy8aydGLLfzytuIE0EyzCs5cHaFeLwpxbrB%2F93A%2BX334r3UF74N18%2F8kTXF98qx6q3xsJ4VSW2UvtckzvDDKf5cRpfeqmH95Nd0B4Tn3kbq08jnRtjJNvkTNZqlYDR9udK0Ybm5QGeDnmhQEVTdOlDFWnLpGYbFyg4%2FG9iFaAlOp5isEX6r1DKzOHYQzJJRw2MQ%3D

Detroit, MI 48221

subject: Who are you picking?

body:
| | | Peter, Joe Biden’s America and President Trump’s America look _very_ different.

**Do you think Donald Trump’s America or Joe Biden’s America was better?**

[**Let us know now!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=cfd51595e62b4841a4ad34e2b3d175b3&_e=-yX6n7AmWF5slnPleuVx9644zSzRKqqVBUNa2BCRYgOrK3Q_AzedWg-2zDpXHc0X48HZ2JByMgD3i1ecsTJJ8AEnXJ0n39d8xE-uwOVgn5K1xYUeCgGPgGi6fcib1aOh5r4FAk4Tn7h4DEQzM1H-sGSKZKZPtMzs7Ix3fhi3lcbJjB7H3vd9k5BNMilutFXhPSTR3YQe0lA3B_dha1KNSJUPeCfDtJqDh3Gegw2xUqCJyffZVA3a4VdDnIRDlcxampCVc_6k3VwkUiVU64w48X68zYpLBrYxwibxSkCWkBeBHZriNf1cA7Vz2m2E1Uy1uAGSOaO-hkzHRyI5OfR4mZ908KBIljUUEjJyTeYwOGUjcfVp_TNvU3NlulnDs67jAweXqPfiEAI6r7DaqvhV9_yvDT922YN2bIyVY2mFCQM%3D)

**We have an opportunity to make history this year in Colorado, Peter. If elected to Congress, Dr. Yadira Caraveo would be Colorado’s FIRST Latina member of Congress.**

It will be a tough road to victory this November, and Yadira’s going to need your help to win. [**So Peter, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to elect Colorado’s first Latina member of Congress and help Team Caraveo make history?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46444466/350284177/228117528?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.12_b1_tc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTE4OGFhYi05OWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lA0C4jurFYW3MOwi2wjzwuF41u40zYT_iAQArYogDSI=)

Dr. Caraveo is not new to making history. She changed the course of history for her family when she was the first to attend and graduate from college. **But she knew she could do more to make life a little better for families like hers.**

**So she ran for the state legislature — and won.** She went on to pass laws that established paid sick leave for Coloradans and extended eviction protections during the pandemic. And she stood up to big pharma, big oil, and big gas along the way.

[**Now, she’s ready to make history again. Dr. Caraveo has the life and leadership experience to make history right here in Colorado, but she can’t do it without your help. We’re less than two weeks away from the primary election, so can you chip in right now to get Dr. Yadira Caraveo to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46444469/350284180/228117528?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2022.06.12_b1_tc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTE4OGFhYi05OWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lA0C4jurFYW3MOwi2wjzwuF41u40zYT_iAQArYogDSI=)

clean_body: | = We have an opportunity to make history this year in Colorado, Peter. If elected to Congress, Dr. Yadira Caraveo would be Colorado’s FIRST Latina member of Congress. It will be a tough road to victory this November, and Yadira’s going to need your help to win. = = = Dr. Caraveo is not new to making history. She changed the course of history for her family when she was the first to attend and graduate from college. But she knew she could do more to make life a little better for families like hers. So she ran for the state legislature — and won. She went on to pass laws that established paid sick leave for Coloradans and extended eviction protections during the pandemic. And she stood up to big pharma, big oil, and big gas along the way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for all you do. – Team Caraveo | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. name: Team Abrams
subject: what we did in the last week to earn votes from Georgians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek, every day
our team is hard at work earning the votes to ensure Stacey Abrams is the
next governor of Georgia.

Check out some of the things grassroots
supporters like you
made possible this week, and then we hope you’ll [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1438?refcode=sa_em_220612_B1_3Things_S1_T1_TA_T3&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1001&akid=615%2E1862389%2Eqxm3k3 ]make your
first contribution of
just $5 so we can ramp up this critical work:

1. Last weekend, Stacey kicked off her first official travel in the
general election for governor with campaign stops in Columbus and
Reynolds.
2. On Monday, Stacey celebrated the Class of 2022 and spoke to them about
the importance of young voters at our high school graduation event in
Atlanta.
3. All week, volunteers called and texted voters across Georgia, shared
stories about why they’re in this fight and learned some of the best
ways to organize their communities during our first-ever Virtual Week
of Action.

We couldn’t have done any of that without
supporters like
you, Derek.
From the bottom of our hearts, thank you.

But we’re not the only ones working around the clock. Just last week,
Brian Kemp spent nearly half a million dollars on negative ads against
Stacey.

That’s why we need your support now more than ever,
Derek. Can you rush a donation
of $5 or whatever you can afford right now?

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1438?refcode=sa_em_220612_B1_3Things_S1_T1_TA_T3&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=615%2E1862389%2Eqxm3k3 ]Anything you can give will help make sure we have the resources we need
to get Stacey’s message out to all Georgia voters, do critical voter
protection work and fight back against Republican attacks. Please, chip in
today >>

Enjoy the rest of your weekend,
Team Abrams

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=615%2E1862389%2Eqxm3k3

name: Team Lombardo
subject: Before Tuesday…
body:
We’re coming up on the FINAL 48 HOURS of the primary elections here in Nevada - but there’s still time for us to make an impact if we act fast.
---
| | | | | | |
---
|

[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rH5RPzRznRE94hrGKGIZhI3AEzFJIz6P2U9xSqSm05wPJnEHC58mIgkap77lePvsQqUWYnGNtxFZmKIk4SQ033Iw2Z2KuM2QLiqSlvFrKD-U9H98PrJraziUqxpn7p341ryYK5bbmPHiyOZwfmFCs5yBjGgJc8twt_cSL3sHUaBFKuKAJjM5h2RPlw0zzuCqUEXItQ-t0d9cziGx-zKCMLWXaq7J2ZPs&c=hVIkicEdNFHoKQoNXGdCBz8SriR9crIlZ3r2NExiYY_KjMwAUXUi7Q==&ch=5_yY0WVu2d8R1y3vg_dE_zv7gMwgmbUmR3F37ffcrRkseNvSpcs-Uw==)

| Peter,
We're coming up on the FINAL 48 HOURS of the primary elections here in Nevada - but there's still time for us to make an impact if we act fast.
Trump-endorsed Sheriff Joe Lombardo is the clear frontrunner... But that's also made him a top target of not just his primary opponents, but of Steve Sisolak and the national Democrat machine, too!
They've tried every dirty trick in the book - because they know if they get to face some weak opponent instead of a proven, trusted law enforcement leader like Joe, Steve Sisolak will get re-elected even in spite of his many failures. We can't let that happen.
So before the BIG ELECTION DAY on Tuesday, we are launching a FINAL voter contact drive to MAKE SURE that Joe ends up being our nominee.
[Will you help make this drive a success? >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rH5RPzRznRE94hrGKGIZhI3AEzFJIz6P2U9xSqSm05wPJnEHC58mIgkap77lePvsQqUWYnGNtxFZmKIk4SQ033Iw2Z2KuM2QLiqSlvFrKD-U9H98PrJraziUqxpn7p341ryYK5bbmPHiyOZwfmFCs5yBjGgJc8twt_cSL3sHUaBFKuKAJjM5h2RPlw0zzuCqUEXItQ-t0d9cziGx-zKCMLWXaq7J2ZPs&c=hVIkicEdNFHoKQoNXGdCBz8SriR9crIlZ3r2NExiYY_KjMwAUXUi7Q==&ch=5_yY0WVu2d8R1y3vg_dE_zv7gMwgmbUmR3F37ffcrRkseNvSpcs-Uw==)
Your grassroots support equals more voters reached so that we can turn out as many Nevadans as possible on Tuesday and propel Sheriff Joe Lombardo to a HUGE VICTORY!
When taking everything into account, every $10 raised ends up equalling 3 new voters hearing our message! So if you have the means, please send in even just 10 bucks below to help our campaign finish strong before Election Day!!!

name: Herschel Walker
subject: re: The Senate majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we’re going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals. . |

---
Fellow American - Democrats know it. And we know it, too.

The Senate race in Georgia will go down to the wire. Democrats are going to spend whatever it takes to keep their politician in the Senate and maintain their razor-thin majority. Take a look at the panicked email they sent:

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2664343317d4462fbccf1e78a1833a04&_e=AsGllS7W16sSbdibHUGfjrgFjIJbV8VfpUYamiBxj4bka0vIQ8Y949Bl5ywMr0aV5hiu0spZPO08spqJld6YGpnfD7mIgBhFLB_wVSqJ9DAx3kQsGrf9-Z7WM2lBeyV_AUXiIqrHGrhQLM90HiSMzB3WgEgxO_2IzLst6fe46z06SmX3mZS_z5s9pnMqKW8rEMnXn8K0LGJ_Pm3ehxePiJxh5kzgXpUCTxdTWZxkI1JAT2LOCT9C7dUMZq3O8xPFd-CpUoDVUNxlwVfJq9KANFxZhUobKcolQ0G6JNtJ5ik142BZhXadDnVIzqafbLSrR40ObDADsFMDoWte_klZnFin0xFiQ65uEkJe_wWvkMNQOD8UE3w0MMTEMteAqjBLyRSu4hzIG-tnshZCLvQ8D_dVkTPMIPZeq-FIFYfQ5k767bCcBpriaMDQ-TKZOhiwlqfPkHV1nE--ZqRG0VSEwAEQz6f6w1jBO8HnXI-2v6Q%3D)
The Democrats are on a roll with their fundraising. Their supporters understand what's at stake - control of the U.S. Senate and the fate of the Biden-Schumer-Pelosi agenda. In Georgia, we're running against the #1 fundraising senator in the country who already has $23 million in his campaign war chest.

Our campaign is being aggressive in our fundraising, but we're behind our June goal - by a significant amount. We hate writing emails like this 5 months from Election Day, but **we must hit every fundraising goal along the way if we're going to have the necessary funds to win in November.**

**[In an effort to get back on course, we're asking 1,500 conservatives to make a donation of $10 or more before midnight tonight.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2664343317d4462fbccf1e78a1833a04&_e=AsGllS7W16sSbdibHUGfjrgFjIJbV8VfpUYamiBxj4bka0vIQ8Y949Bl5ywMr0aV5hiu0spZPO08spqJld6YGpnfD7mIgBhFLB_wVSqJ9DAx3kQsGrf9-Z7WM2lBeyV_AUXiIqrHGrhQLM90HiSMzB3WgEgxO_2IzLst6fe46z06SmX3mZS_z5s9pnMqKW8rEMnXn8K0LGJ_Pm3ehxePiJxh5kzgXpUCTxdTWZxkI1JAT2LOCT9C7dUMZq3O8xPFd-CpUoDVUNxlwVfJq9KANBDHUiwTOMwH6yO5-TnsaMTJovKg4rjQawZpBMKgZluoFUWxzVTPjquPTb_YAfHmmCCOrzkrB54Jeu5u53qzkdONgRJZ5kX_KcpPeYhzLnL7HpRw0QXVFQSVP5un7AplDqYpogzLi8N_S_dKW4UADYcAChuBINt_mHBueIxu5oHGn3qKapH2Fu52AG6d0FucDZyWpsEs_Gp8Fs1VQPwpNzc%3D)**

_The last thing that we want is for complacency to set in. While some conservatives believe we have the wind at our back, that doesn't translate into automatic victory in November. Far from it._

clean_body: If we’re going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals. . | Fellow American - Democrats know it. And we know it, too. The Senate race in Georgia will go down to the wire. Democrats are going to spend whatever it takes to keep their politician in the Senate and maintain their razor-thin majority. Take a look at the panicked email they sent: The Democrats are on a roll with their fundraising. Their supporters understand what's at stake - control of the U.S. Senate and the fate of the Biden-Schumer-Pelosi agenda. In Georgia, we're running against the #1 fundraising senator in the country who already has $23 million in his campaign war chest. Our campaign is being aggressive in our fundraising, but we're behind our June goal - by a significant amount. We hate writing emails like this 5 months from Election Day, but we must hit every fundraising goal along the way if we're going to have the necessary funds to win in November. The last thing that we want is for complacency to set in. While some conservatives believe we have the wind at our back, that doesn't translate into automatic victory in November. Far from it. We must block, tackle, and excel at the basics of campaigning - like raising money, organizing volunteers, and registering voters - to win. The future of the country is on the line, so we are humbly asking for you to help us get back on track today. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Nominee for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

subject: Checking back in

body:
We wouldn't be reaching out if it weren't so important.
| | |
---

I had to make sure you saw the latest polling numbers: **They show MLG just _4 POINTS_ ahead of her GOP challenger, Mark Ronchetti. **

This is way too slim of a margin for comfort.

If we don't stay on track with fundraising, that means we'll cede control of New Mexico to a far-right, radical extremist who is determined to take this state – and our country – backward.

name: Mandy Patinkin and Kathryn Grody
subject: We all need to get motivated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
We're reaching out again because Roe v. Wade is on the verge of being overturned.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46444857/350286359/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1159-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDAyMGZjNC05YmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WTsMe8TyIr-E3DLqwIVwQYlGYdaCw5nV_RRSi5vj-A4=)
| | _Kathryn Grody and Mandy Patinkin are actors and activists who have been married for almost 42 years. Patinkin is most known for his roles in Homeland and The Princess Bride. Grody wrote and acted in an autobiographical play called Mom's Life. During the 2020 election, Grody and Patinkin gathered a large social media following for their viral videos encouraging people to vote. _
---
We're outraged, folks —

**We're reaching out again because Roe v. Wade is on the verge of being overturned**.

This is not a drill. This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. As we said before, we cannot roll on the floor, despondent and shaking. Instead, we ALL need to get motivated – because Republicans are attacking a woman's fundamental right to choose before our eyes.
It’s a matter of individual liberty. It's about the fundamental right for a woman to make her own health decisions. And Republicans are attacking these rights at the highest level of government.

Mitch McConnell and the entire Republican party have been working towards this moment since Roe v. Wade was decided nearly 50 years ago. They packed the courts at every level with extreme anti-choice judges. They passed increasingly restrictive and dangerous abortion laws across the country. And they implemented the most extreme right-wing agenda of our lifetime, ensuring that their policies persist long after they're gone. **McConnell even threatened to ban abortion nationwide if the GOP takes back the Senate.**
**[The stakes of the midterms have never been higher, and we need you in this fight with us now more than ever.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46444858/350286360/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1159-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDAyMGZjNC05YmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WTsMe8TyIr-E3DLqwIVwQYlGYdaCw5nV_RRSi5vj-A4=)**
If we're going to defend access to abortion, there is no question that we need to protect pro-choice Democrats in the Senate, starting with Maggie Hassan.

Maggie has been unwavering in her commitment to protecting reproductive rights in New Hampshire and across the country. And we absolutely cannot afford to lose her leadership.
**[So please, donate $3 or whatever you can to reelect Maggie in New Hampshire so we can defend and expand our pro-choice Democratic majority in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46444859/350286361/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1159-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDAyMGZjNC05YmVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WTsMe8TyIr-E3DLqwIVwQYlGYdaCw5nV_RRSi5vj-A4=)**

clean_body: We're reaching out again because Roe v. Wade is on the verge of being overturned. | | | = | | Kathryn Grody and Mandy Patinkin are actors and activists who have been married for almost 42 years. Patinkin is most known for his roles in Homeland and The Princess Bride. Grody wrote and acted in an autobiographical play called Mom's Life. During the 2020 election, Grody and Patinkin gathered a large social media following for their viral videos encouraging people to vote. We're outraged, folks — We're reaching out again because Roe v. Wade is on the verge of being overturned. This is not a drill. This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. As we said before, we cannot roll on the floor, despondent and shaking. Instead, we ALL need to get motivated – because Republicans are attacking a woman's fundamental right to choose before our eyes. It’s a matter of individual liberty. It's about the fundamental right for a woman to make her own health decisions. And Republicans are attacking these rights at the highest level of government. Mitch McConnell and the entire Republican party have been working towards this moment since Roe v. Wade was decided nearly 50 years ago. They packed the courts at every level with extreme anti-choice judges. They passed increasingly restrictive and dangerous abortion laws across the country. And they implemented the most extreme right-wing agenda of our lifetime, ensuring that their policies persist long after they're gone. McConnell even threatened to ban abortion nationwide if the GOP takes back the Senate. = If we're going to defend access to abortion, there is no question that we need to protect pro-choice Democrats in the Senate, starting with Maggie Hassan. Maggie has been unwavering in her commitment to protecting reproductive rights in New Hampshire and across the country. And we absolutely cannot afford to lose her leadership. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for still being with us in this fight. We can't believe after 50 years of fighting for equal rights, we're still marching together. subject: WATCH: I'm a hard kill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:

---
Peter,

Today we're hitting the Nevada airwaves with our latest television and digital ad campaign _Hard to Kill_ , [**which you can watch right here.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568538:6s4ttFoN6:m:1:3253819041:3357ECB1253EA706D484D0A50B72B0AB:r)

With early voting less than 2 months away for Nevada's primary we need every Nevada voter to see this ad and hear our message about restoring Conservative, Duty First leadership in Washington.

Unlike other candidates in this race, I didn't start off with a massive donor network or D.C. connections. We defied the odds and made this race a "TOSS-UP" because our message is resonating with Nevada voters and Conservative grassroots donors like you.

But if we're going to compete with the **$10 million my opponent** is spending on ads ALONE, [**I need your financial support of $10, $20, $50 or even more to keep our ad campaign running through Election Day.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568538:6s4ttFoN6:m:1:3253819041:3357ECB1253EA706D484D0A50B72B0AB:r)

[KEEP OUR AD RUNNING w/ $10 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568539:6s4ttFoN6:m:1:3253819041:3357ECB1253EA706D484D0A50B72B0AB:r) [KEEP OUR AD RUNNING w/ $20 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568540:6s4ttFoN6:m:1:3253819041:3357ECB1253EA706D484D0A50B72B0AB:r) [KEEP OUR AD RUNNING w/ $50 >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568541:6s4ttFoN6:m:1:3253819041:3357ECB1253EA706D484D0A50B72B0AB:r) [_CUSTOM AMOUNT_ >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568538:6s4ttFoN6:m:1:3253819041:3357ECB1253EA706D484D0A50B72B0AB:r)
Our ad campaign will show voters I'm the only candidate with the tenacity and conviction to stick to my Conservative values, and I won't sell out our voters to the D.C. establishment, because I owe them nothing.

Even Obama confessed our race in Nevada will decide the Senate Majority. [**Do your part to keep our campaign on the offensive by pitching in whatever you can to keep this ad running in Nevada.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568538:6s4ttFoN6:m:1:3253819041:3357ECB1253EA706D484D0A50B72B0AB:r)

[Keep Our Ad Running
PITCH IN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60568538:6s4ttFoN6:m:1:3253819041:3357ECB1253EA706D484D0A50B72B0AB:r)

---
| | Peter,

We’re reaching out to you urgently because conservative patriot Scott Baugh just won his primary election and now we all must support him in his race against far-left Progressive Caucus leader Katie Porter!

You see, Katie Porter is trying to have it both ways. She’s telling voters in California that she opposes earmarks because they “invite corruption and wasteful backroom deals.”

But, at the same time, she voted for a more than $1 trillion spending bill chock full of earmarks! In fact, the bill included more than 4,000 earmarks totaling 367 pages.

We can’t let her get away with these lies. That’s why we’re urgently asking you to [sign Scott Baugh’s petition](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=3c48001c68&e=8a657725d1) to hold her accountable:
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=22396c3644&e=8a657725d1)
---
| [DIGITALLY SIGN HERE]( "DIGITALLY SIGN HERE")
---
| Helping Scott Baugh defeat Katie Porter is a top priority for Republicans nationwide because it is one of the most important seats that needs to flip to take back the House. If we come up short in California’s 47th Congressional District, it’ll give Nancy Pelosi a much better chance of holding onto the Speaker’s gavel.

So, please, [sign this petition ASAP](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=879619d0db&e=8a657725d1), and if you can afford to do so, please [consider making a donation](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=9094b50194&e=8a657725d1) to help Scott Baugh defeat Katie Porter!

Thank you,
