name: Peter Welch
subject: My friend Tim
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Expanding our Senate majority is crucial to fighting for working people across the country

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=523%2E61531%2EuzbbZ3)
Hello,
There’s a lot at stake this November.
And if we’re going to fight for working people across the country, not only do we need to defend our Senate Majority, we need to expand it.
Fighting for some of our most fundamental rights like the constitutional right to an abortion, the right to vote, and the right to affordable health care depends on our ability to keep the Senate blue.
That means winning here in Vermont and also flipping states like Ohio blue. I’m proud to be in the fight with my friend Tim Ryan. Tim and I have served together in the House for years, and I’ve seen firsthand how passionate and effective he is.
[**The only way we can win is by working together. Can you split a contribution between my campaign and Tim’s campaign right away?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2957?t=3&akid=523%2E61531%2EuzbbZ3)
[CHIP IN ](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2957?t=7&t=8&akid=523%2E61531%2EuzbbZ3)
---
Expanding our Senate majority means we’ll finally see the Senate act on issues that impact folks around the country. Whether you’re from Ohio or Vermont, reining in big tech, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, giving families access to affordable childcare—there’s so much on the line.
**That’s why winning and expanding our majority is so important, and why we must go on offense in places like Ohio.[ Split a donation between me and Tim Ryan right away so we can keep fighting for progress.](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2957?t=4&akid=523%2E61531%2EuzbbZ3)**
We can’t do this without you.
Thanks so much,
Peter

subject: The Great American Tradition - PRIMARY PROCESS
body:
The Great American Tradition - PRIMARY PROCESS | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1865d9f34d99/happy-new-year-6095049?e=6582090d83)
---
|
---
**TO: SOUTH CAROLINA REPUBLICANS****The Great American Tradition** It is with the greatest concern for a Great American Tradition that I share my heart with you today. Part of the long standing tradition called the “Primary Process” was put in place for 2 specific reasons.

First, it allowed the COMPLETE vetting of the incumbent, forcing him/her to justify their voting records, comments made, public record, and any other information that would help voters to make good voting decisions.

Second, it allows those running against the incumbents an opportunity to voice their opinions, share their political insights, and ultimately cast a vision for how they would operate if elected.

Unfortunately, just the opposite took place in the South Carolina District 4 Republican Party Primary for the U.S. House in Greenville and Spartanburg Counties and it was **OBVIOUS** to the membership.

The establishment Republicans, news organizations, local political rags, and other prognosticators/pontificators went into hyperdrive to protect a very weak and ineffective Congressman, William Richardson Timmons IV.

They circled the wagons around TIMMONS; cancelled the voices of opponents; failed to accurately **RESEARCH** and portray his positions; and worked in concert (collusion) to protect the ineffective incumbent.

Why would you NOT want the PRIMARY PROCESS to unfold as designed? Why would establishment Republicans take a play out of the Democrat's cancel-culture playbook?

**Answer: Raw power!**

It is because of the refusal of the establishment Republicans to **DO THEIR JOBS** and let the primary process unfold as designed, that I will NOW do it for them and help them along the way.

Listed below are the 13 reasons why NOT to vote for the incumbent, William Timmons. He is the most ineffective congressman in District 4 since a Democrat held the office decades ago. His social agenda is EXTREMELY liberal like his mentor Lindsey Graham. As a result of his dismal record and lack of leadership, Timmons has remained virtually silent and untouched.1\. Soft on the social issues like transgenderism, drag queens, and other things that could harm our children. (listen to Charlie James audio and view Timmons’ congressional correspondence)2\. Cosponsored a CASINO Bill **H.R. 8255** with the Marxist-Socialist leaning James Clyburn of the Democrat Party3\. It was reported by The Standard Newspaper that Timmons took $35,000 from the casino lobby in a “pay to play” scheme when he told us that he couldn’t be bought4\. Timmons would NOT agree to 3 no-holds-barred debates with Mike LaPierre but instead sought the safety of just 1 HIGHLY manipulated “forum” by the establishment Republicans5\. Timmons refuses to join the House Freedom Caucus which is the most conservative caucus in Washington, DC. **Why?** 6\. He says on YouTube that he votes with SQUAD member A.O.C. 5-10% of the time... **REALLY**?7\. Inexperienced William says on YouTube that getting an advanced liberal arts degree (Philosophy) is a poor return on investment8\. Timmons said on YouTube, and I quote, “I am NOT for Lindsey Graham” and then turns around and writes him a big fat campaign check and aggressively campaigns for Graham9\. Timmons said in a Palmetto House Republican Women’s group that the forerunner to our religious freedom, and I quote, is an “unproductive issue.” He thinks having a proper discussion and understanding of Separation of Church and State is an “unproductive issue” which are his words, not mine10\. Timmons says on YouTube that he votes the way a majority of his constituents want him to vote. What does he do perform some kind of a referendum on each and every vote? Sounds like he supports a pure democracy instead of representative government to me11\. Timmons voted to spend over $56 Billion on aid to the Ukraine while remaining silent on his legislative plans at our Southern Borders12\. Timmons selected a former professional poker player for his **CHIEF OF STAFF** 13\. Timmons is on record saying, “I like the Infrastructure Bill because it creates jobs” (that would be the $1 Trillion Marxist-Socialist Green New Deal Infrastructure Bill)14\. Timmons voted for 1⁄2 of the $1.5 Trillion Consolidated Appropriations Bill when conservatives Jeff Duncan and Ralph Norman voted NO-NO15\. To top is all off, Timmons has the 15th highest absentee rate in all of Congress (he simply does not show up to work)Why wouldn’t the establishment Republicans, news organizations, and political pundits want this information fully vetted? Why are they now character assassinating anyone who would dare bring these facts to the forefront?**Answer: RAW POWER****VOTE Mike LaPierre for Congress**
SC District 4 - Greenville and Spartanburg Counties

An experienced business executive and professional strategist that knows how to solve problems

I LIKE MIKE
God bless the beautiful state of SOUTH CAROLINA!
|

clean_body: The Great American Tradition - PRIMARY PROCESS | | | | TO: SOUTH CAROLINA REPUBLICANSThe Great American Tradition It is with the greatest concern for a Great American Tradition that I share my heart with you today. Part of the long standing tradition called the “Primary Process” was put in place for 2 specific reasons. First, it allowed the COMPLETE vetting of the incumbent, forcing him/her to justify their voting records, comments made, public record, and any other information that would help voters to make good voting decisions. Second, it allows those running against the incumbents an opportunity to voice their opinions, share their political insights, and ultimately cast a vision for how they would operate if elected. Unfortunately, just the opposite took place in the South Carolina District 4 Republican Party Primary for the U.S. House in Greenville and Spartanburg Counties and it was OBVIOUS to the membership. The establishment Republicans, news organizations, local political rags, and other prognosticators/pontificators went into hyperdrive to protect a very weak and ineffective Congressman, William Richardson Timmons IV. They circled the wagons around TIMMONS; cancelled the voices of opponents; failed to accurately RESEARCH and portray his positions; and worked in concert (collusion) to protect the ineffective incumbent. Why would you NOT want the PRIMARY PROCESS to unfold as designed? Why would establishment Republicans take a play out of the Democrat's cancel-culture playbook? Answer: Raw power! It is because of the refusal of the establishment Republicans to DO THEIR JOBS and let the primary process unfold as designed, that I will NOW do it for them and help them along the way. Listed below are the 13 reasons why NOT to vote for the incumbent, William Timmons. He is the most ineffective congressman in District 4 since a Democrat held the office decades ago. His social agenda is EXTREMELY liberal like his mentor Lindsey Graham. As a result of his dismal record and lack of leadership, Timmons has remained virtually silent and untouched.1\. Soft on the social issues like transgenderism, drag queens, and other things that could harm our children. (listen to Charlie James audio and view Timmons’ congressional correspondence)2\. Cosponsored a CASINO Bill H.R. 8255 with the Marxist-Socialist leaning James Clyburn of the Democrat Party3\. It was reported by The Standard Newspaper that Timmons took $35,000 from the casino lobby in a “pay to play” scheme when he told us that he couldn’t be bought4\. Timmons would NOT agree to 3 no-holds-barred debates with Mike LaPierre but instead sought the safety of just 1 HIGHLY manipulated “forum” by the establishment Republicans5\. Timmons refuses to join the House Freedom Caucus which is the most conservative caucus in Washington, DC. Why? 6\. He says on YouTube that he votes with SQUAD member A.O.C. 5-10% of the time... REALLY?7\. Inexperienced William says on YouTube that getting an advanced liberal arts degree (Philosophy) is a poor return on investment8\. Timmons said on YouTube, and I quote, “I am NOT for Lindsey Graham” and then turns around and writes him a big fat campaign check and aggressively campaigns for Graham9\. Timmons said in a Palmetto House Republican Women’s group that the forerunner to our religious freedom, and I quote, is an “unproductive issue.” He thinks having a proper discussion and understanding of Separation of Church and State is an “unproductive issue” which are his words, not mine10\. Timmons says on YouTube that he votes the way a majority of his constituents want him to vote. What does he do perform some kind of a referendum on each and every vote? Sounds like he supports a pure democracy instead of representative government to me11\. Timmons voted to spend over $56 Billion on aid to the Ukraine while remaining silent on his legislative plans at our Southern Borders12\. Timmons selected a former professional poker player for his CHIEF OF STAFF 13\. Timmons is on record saying, “I like the Infrastructure Bill because it creates jobs” (that would be the $1 Trillion Marxist-Socialist Green New Deal Infrastructure Bill)14\. Timmons voted for 1⁄2 of the $1.5 Trillion Consolidated Appropriations Bill when conservatives Jeff Duncan and Ralph Norman voted NO-NO15\. To top is all off, Timmons has the 15th highest absentee rate in all of Congress (he simply does not show up to work)Why wouldn’t the establishment Republicans, news organizations, and political pundits want this information fully vetted? Why are they now character assassinating anyone who would dare bring these facts to the forefront?Answer: RAW POWERVOTE Mike LaPierre for Congress SC District 4 - Greenville and Spartanburg Counties An experienced business executive and professional strategist that knows how to solve problems I LIKE MIKE God bless the beautiful state of SOUTH CAROLINA! | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 LaPierre for House. body:
Hi team, it’s Senator Schumer again.
---
I wanted to make sure you saw my earlier note. I was just looking over the signatures on our petition calling on the Supreme Court to protect reproductive rights, and unfortunately we’re 19 signatures short in Pennsylvania.
The deadline is tonight. Given the urgency of the situation, it’s critical that we reach this signature goal. So please, add your name now: **[www.dscc.org/ReproductiveRightsPetition](https://go.dscc.org/go/7638?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220612-ChuckFwd-RoeOverturnFRBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220612-ChuckFwd-RoeOverturnFRBump-Pros-sl1&akid=4687%2E9716520%2Ep-Cdfx)**
Thanks,
Chuck
\------ Forwarded message ------
From: Chuck Schumer
Date: Fri, June 10, 2022
Subject: re: Roe v. Wade overturned -
| | | Team, it's Senator Schumer.

I urgently need you to sign our petition to defend reproductive rights.

The Supreme Court is on the verge of overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , and the right to choose is under attack by Republicans across the country -- so we have to take a stand now. Please add your name to protect reproductive rights: **[www.dscc.org/ReproductiveRightsPetition](https://go.dscc.org/go/7638?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220612-ChuckFwd-RoeOverturnFRBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220612-ChuckFwd-RoeOverturnFRBump-Pros-sl1&akid=4687%2E9716520%2Ep-Cdfx)**

Thank you,

Chuck Schumer

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7638?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220612-ChuckFwd-RoeOverturnFRBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220612-ChuckFwd-RoeOverturnFRBump-Pros-sl1&akid=4687%2E9716520%2Ep-Cdfx)

| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=3122%2E878179%2EDCoq_Z)._

| Look, there's 3 quick things you need to know about Val Demings' make-or-break Senate race:

**ONE:** Former Trump Impeachment Manager Val Demings is surging in the polls against Trump's favorite Senator, Marco Rubio!

**TWO:** Marco Rubio is panicking, so his billionaire buddies are about to flood Florida with boatloads of dark money to _ruin_ Val's people-powered campaign.

**THREE:** That's why we're laser-focused on hitting our $35,000 Mid-Month Fundraising goal to SAVE Democrats like Val Demings - _and defend the Senate._

**And right now, Democrat Val Demings is catching up to Marco Rubio:**
[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14514?t=9&akid=3122%2E878179%2EDCoq_Z)
We need to keep up Val's _incredible_ momentum to help Democrats like her DEFEAT her Trump-loving Republican opponents.

But we need a _surge_ of 3,500 donations before our strict Mid-Month deadline. **Falling even one donation short would _ruin_ our chances at keeping the Senate!**

subject: Did you watch the January 6th hearing?
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019MDzfghI9IgzpIPkd6icowlj5vQSrQ9ByNwLIsbGlEAj4QmdlZngDUYIJFCgPF_nPqxmzaCYvu3OxphN65zZexYixI7aMdN_9eXLaF48xBfaMxB8RtbRP48slcDjhRrH4SAFJWqS6laIOd_XMHpuejJUKLicPZlKORVASO3jdT0eTdRx3_cVIWeV1FRbDM7iMiIAh-sfU_qCuRjHy3eKdAN8gIZMqEc3vZh7EUEaKvNNY81m_IWdNlBWHWQDUC0JhfspMnE1xDs=&c=fITeUY_vHASwV_IjLs0SBCYzeWWWTyMesiKGCuHUF0L_YSHG74vCPw==&ch=PBl1FPOj4J-X9UOfWSwmwC9pFiQcCplA1XNpP0nDBzVyFrU5haA-Dg==)

| Peter,
While you're busy dealing with $5/gallon gas, the Swamp is focusing in on January 6th...
That's right - Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney are STILL dead-set on using the 1/06 Fed-surrection to smear every single Trump supporter in America!
In fact, Democrats will be doing a primetime, made-for-TV stunt to try to distract the American people from their own failures. Before the CNN propagandists eat up this garbage and level attacks on our entire America-First movement, WE NEED TO BE ABLE TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST THEIR LIES!
That's why I'm calling for a wave of support to help us counter the regime propaganda after Pelosi and the RINOs put on this shameless stunt.
[Fight back against the Jan. 6 lies by clicking this link!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019MDzfghI9IgzpIPkd6icowlj5vQSrQ9ByNwLIsbGlEAj4QmdlZngDUYIJFCgPF_nPqxmzaCYvu3OxphN65zZexYixI7aMdN_9eXLaF48xBfaMxB8RtbRP48slcDjhRrH4SAFJWqS6laIOd_XMHpuejJUKLicPZlKORVASO3jdT0eTdRx3_cVIWeV1FRbDM7iMiIAh-sfU_qCuRjHy3eKdAN8gIZMqEc3vZh7EUEaKvNNY81m_IWdNlBWHWQDUC0JhfspMnE1xDs=&c=fITeUY_vHASwV_IjLs0SBCYzeWWWTyMesiKGCuHUF0L_YSHG74vCPw==&ch=PBl1FPOj4J-X9UOfWSwmwC9pFiQcCplA1XNpP0nDBzVyFrU5haA-Dg==)

| | | [DEFEND OUR MOVEMENT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019MDzfghI9IgzpIPkd6icowlj5vQSrQ9ByNwLIsbGlEAj4QmdlZngDUYIJFCgPF_nPqxmzaCYvu3OxphN65zZexYixI7aMdN_9eXLaF48xBfaMxB8RtbRP48slcDjhRrH4SAFJWqS6laIOd_XMHpuejJUKLicPZlKORVASO3jdT0eTdRx3_cVIWeV1FRbDM7iMiIAh-sfU_qCuRjHy3eKdAN8gIZMqEc3vZh7EUEaKvNNY81m_IWdNlBWHWQDUC0JhfspMnE1xDs=&c=fITeUY_vHASwV_IjLs0SBCYzeWWWTyMesiKGCuHUF0L_YSHG74vCPw==&ch=PBl1FPOj4J-X9UOfWSwmwC9pFiQcCplA1XNpP0nDBzVyFrU5haA-Dg==)

| Peter, the America-Last uniparty has already used the Ray Epps-led Fed-surrection as a means of denying Trump supporters their rights...
They even tried to use it as an excuse to ban Trump Republicans from running for office!!!
That's why we know they don't give a damn about "defending democracy." This is about power and about putting an end to the America-First movement PERMANENTLY.
We need to be able to get the truth out now more than ever. So unless you want this latest Jan. 6 stunt to be the end of our movement, help us counter Pelosi and Cheney's lies by stepping up ASAP.
---
| | | [FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE ILLEGITIMATE COMMITTEE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019MDzfghI9IgzpIPkd6icowlj5vQSrQ9ByNwLIsbGlEAj4QmdlZngDUYIJFCgPF_nPqxmzaCYvu3OxphN65zZexYixI7aMdN_9eXLaF48xBfaMxB8RtbRP48slcDjhRrH4SAFJWqS6laIOd_XMHpuejJUKLicPZlKORVASO3jdT0eTdRx3_cVIWeV1FRbDM7iMiIAh-sfU_qCuRjHy3eKdAN8gIZMqEc3vZh7EUEaKvNNY81m_IWdNlBWHWQDUC0JhfspMnE1xDs=&c=fITeUY_vHASwV_IjLs0SBCYzeWWWTyMesiKGCuHUF0L_YSHG74vCPw==&ch=PBl1FPOj4J-X9UOfWSwmwC9pFiQcCplA1XNpP0nDBzVyFrU5haA-Dg==)

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: A day to be proud of 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie_
body:
I'm here to support all New Mexicans.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46446116/350291696/-532505380?refcode=EM_C_220612Pridefest_H_MTO_90DO_3_G_N_LOGO&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDVlMDY4NS1hOWVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IAiZ9NAJMFYx7kTm9kRLyyAYs2TCSDGdIzjFRJm22Q0=)
Happy PrideFest ABQ!

This weekend, Team MTO and I had the honor of walking in the ABQ Pride Parade with Equality New Mexico as one of their Equality Champions!
I am a long-time supporter of our LGBTQ+ community and was proud to be a part of the movement to legalize same-sex marriage in New Mexico in 2013. It was such a privilege to walk alongside other advocates for equality and see so many of our residents showing up as their authentic selves today.
Celebrating our vibrant community and all the progress we have made over the past decade makes me even more proud to serve you as Secretary of State. While there is still work to be done to ensure all our residents feel safe and accepted in our state, I am thrilled to see the massive strides we have made toward justice and equality.
Together,

Maggie Toulouse Oliver
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael?=
subject: Response to Establishment Lies
body:
| | |
---
| | **Friends,

In response to our first-place finish in Tuesday’s primary, the Establishment and Mr. Guest have had their knives out for me. They’ve unscrupulously attacked my military career, they’ve lied about what I’ve said about Mr. Guest’s votes, and they’ve misrepresented my policy platforms. The crux of their attack was a hit piece by an “independent” media outlet, one that never asked me or my campaign for comment or correction. These are their accusations and my response:** _**$48 trillion of government spending**_
* **Just after I filed to run in late February I briefly considered allowing anyone to purchase Military TriCare/Medicare if they desired, just like what we have in the military and what I have had for years. Within a week or two I determined that this would cost too much money, and that there were more conservative options, such as tort reform and allowing insurance to be purchased across state lines. I never raised this issue on the campaign trail or in any ads, literature, or mail we sent out.**

**_Family Plan_**
* **Unlike Mr. Guest and so many other Swamp politicians, I am horrified by our nation’s long term trends of declining family formation, out of wedlock births, and decreased fertility rates. I initially put forward some ideas to arrest this by creating incentives to offset the many government-created costs of starting and raising a family. **
* **I received a lot of helpful feedback from supporters on how to improve this in a way to avoid creating further government dependency. I followed that advice and improved my plan to focus on increasing child tax deductions to ease the tax burden on working families that are struggling in the Biden economy by letting them keep more of what they earn.**

**_Fiscal Conservatism_**
* **I took a pledge in mid-March to oppose any and all efforts to increase marginal tax rates for people and businesses. I’m a fiscal conservative. Unlike my opponent, I believe that we must have rigorous oversight of the Federal Reserve and stop it from printing trillions of dollars. Unlike my opponent, who voted for numerous multi-trillion dollar spending bills, in addition to Bennie Thompson’s January 6th Commission, I think we need to reduce the $30 trillion national debt. Our future depends on it. It’s why I have pledged to be the first Mississippi member of the very conservative House Freedom Caucus should I be elected.**

**_Military Service_**
* **Mr. Guest’s jerry-rigged attack ad this week focused on the Navy’s earlier politically-motivated grounding. The Navy was unhappy because my unshakable position is that the military must return to being a merit-based organization and that lethality is our supreme objective, not Leftist social doctrines. Therefore we must remove all Diversity, Inclusion, and Equity (DIE) programs and no longer use race or sex for either promotions or quotas in various positions. When they grounded me, I refused to back down. **
* **Mr. Guest has been silent about this Leftist influence in our armed forces, just as he’s been silent about the persecution of the January 6th political prisoners held without trial in violation of their Constitutional due process rights. His advertisement, in fact, attacks me from the Left, lending implicit support to the idea that DIE and wokeism are a good thing. I vehemently disagree. I was willing to put my career on the line for this stance. Eventually the Navy backed down and I began flying again two weeks ago. **

**I’ve often said on the campaign trail that there is always room for improvement and I’m not afraid of taking good advice on how to better represent the people. What centers my personal life is an unwavering belief in Jesus Christ, and what centers my political life is a burning and unquenchable love for our nation. As a Navy pilot, I’ve constantly been willing to lay down my life for our nation, and I will never stop defending her in whatever capacity my future holds. ** **I’m always available to answer questions you may still have at[michael@votecassidy.com](mailto:michael@votecassidy.com).** **Sincerely,** **Michael** **P.S. Our movement’s first place finish on June 7th awakened both our opponent and his Establishment syndicate, and they are currently pouring hundreds of thousands of Swamp dollars into this race. If you can contribute anything to help us to continue to spread our America First message and send a resounding statement to the rest of the country on June 28th, please visit[www.votecassidy.com/contribute](https://votecassidy.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd1ed16d660684d08d27f7e75&id=567df0047d&e=9c0f75db69). Thank you.**

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: My secret to happiness starts in the early morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-wn?refcode=220612-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-wn?refcode=220612-email]Good morning, Peter!
Wiley here!
Want to know my fail-safe tip for a great start to the day? I’ll give you a hint: 🐽🚗
Before I let you in on this, can you donate to my Congressional campaign so I can keep Bo Hines out of Congress? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-wn?refcode=220612-email]
I have one especially important job every morning and that job is the answer: Giving my daughter, Adeline, a piggyback ride down the stairs.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-wn?refcode=220612-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-wn?refcode=220612-email]
Even on the busiest mornings! And it’s always worth it.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-wn?refcode=220612-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-wn?refcode=220612-email]
Adeline loves coming to visit me at work during the summer, which is why I am so glad to have an all-female senior staff for her to look up to. She loves helping my campaign manager, Abby, and my finance director, Alicia, make calls and organize the office!
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-wn?refcode=220612-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-wn?refcode=220612-email]
Here’s another secret: piggyback rides are not just reserved for mornings and as I’m writing this email, the boss is calling.
Talk soon!
Wiley
P.S. Keeping Bo Hines OUT of Congress is going to take all of us. Chip in $30 to help us get ahead of the dark money he’s bringing into our district. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-wn?refcode=220612-email&amount=30]
Wiley Nickel is a Democrat running for North Carolina's 13th Congressional District. Support Wiley with a monthly donation today.
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2206-q2-wn?refcode=220612-email&recurring=true]

name: Tim Ryan
subject: whew
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4120%2E3611125%2ECaDJOb ][IMG]

Whew, what a month, folks!

This month, we’ve already celebrated Bella’s high school graduation and
Brady’s 8th birthday. Safe to say June’s been busy, friend.

And that means I’ve had even less time than normal to focus on
fundraising, which has me a little worried.

In fact, I just glanced at our most up-to-date numbers for June and I’m
not sure we’re on track to hit our fundraising goal this month. That’s why
I had to take just a few minutes to email you and ask for your support.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14608?t=1008&amount=5&akid=4120%2E3611125%2ECaDJOb ]Could you please chip in a grassroots donation and help our campaign
catch up on our fundraising goal to defeat right-wing extremist JD Vance?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14608?t=1009&amount=5&akid=4120%2E3611125%2ECaDJOb ]Donate

At the end of this month we’ll face our first FEC End-of-Quarter deadline
of the General Election, so the next few weeks are sure to be wild.

All eyes will be on Ohio to see who has the support to win this race,
which will decide Senate control.

And it couldn’t be any closer. The polls have our campaign “statistically
tied” with JD Vance and media outlets are calling Ohio’s open Senate seat
a “virtual deadlock.”

That means we can’t afford to miss a single fundraising deadline—no matter
how busy our schedules get. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14608?t=1010&amount=5&akid=4120%2E3611125%2ECaDJOb ]So please, if you can, chip in
$5 to help us catch up and win one of the closest (and most
important) Senate races on the map.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14608?t=1011&amount=5&akid=4120%2E3611125%2ECaDJOb ]Donate

Thanks,

Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=4120%2E3611125%2ECaDJOb ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=4120%2E3611125%2ECaDJOb ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=4120%2E3611125%2ECaDJOb ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=4120%2E3611125%2ECaDJOb ]Donate Once

Niles, Ohio 44446
United States

| | Friends, I just got off the debate stage and wanted to send you a quick email from my phone (sorry for any typos)! Our campaign has always been about using love for our state & our people to power positive change – I’m gratified to have spoken about the issues that matter most to Nebraskans and I hope I made you feel as hopeful for our future as I feel. I am ready to go to Congress to work hard for YOU, stop the Washington obstruction and bring solutions to our problems. Tonight we showed voters across the District that only one candidate in this race will do that. If you can, please help us make the most of tonight’s momentum: [https://secure.actblue.com/patty-congress](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46446449/350295810/333259033?refcode=em_220612_offstage&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220612_offstage&refcode2=43e258c9-acea-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2UyNThjOS1hY2VhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8xsY2DMBuhER05KSX85pR9mMr5Wj4zEpskwae1mIT5Y=) Will write more soon, but for now I simply wanted to say thank you. | | **BREAKING: Mike Pence is attacking our grassroots campaign here in Nevada.** That’s right, team – Trump’s former right-hand man is on a mission to flip Susie Lee’s district bright red to help the GOP in their mission to retake the House. body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Here’s
where things stand right now:

→ FIRST: We just had our best week of organizing yet. Our team knocked on
12,994 doors, wrote 18,840 letters, and made 112,450 phone calls to
voters!

→ THEN: CNN named the Texas Governor's race as one of the TOP elections to
watch.

→ NOW: We need your support to build on this momentum in order to win in
November.

Remember: a recent poll showed Beto statistically tied with Abbott. We can
win, but only if everyone in our grassroots movement pitches in.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220612-2.oLTk9f&refcode=ema20220612-193315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=193315%2E444211%2EzAZ3_b ]Please, make your first
contribution of $3 right now to help
continue this momentum and build the campaign that will elect Beto in
November.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220612-2.oLTk9f&refcode=ema20220612-193315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=193315%2E444211%2EzAZ3_b ]Contribute $3

While Greg Abbott pushes an extreme, right-wing agenda that includes
stripping women of their rights and making it easier to carry a loaded gun
in public without a background check, permit, or training, Beto is working
to unite Texans with a positive vision for our state.

Instead of relying on corporate PACs and NRA checks to fund our campaign,
we’re relying on support from people like you. We need your help to
reach voters all across Texas’ 254 counties and fight back against
Abbott’s $50 million in the bank.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220612-2.oLTk9f&refcode=ema20220612-193315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=193315%2E444211%2EzAZ3_b ]Make a $3 contribution today to help Beto defeat Abbott
and elect a Texas governor who will finally fight for the people.

From our entire team — thank you.

Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=193315%2E444211%2EzAZ3_b

name: Team Caruso for Congress
subject: Thank you!
body:
Thank you for being willing to get involved with Liz Caruso's campaign for Maine's Second Congressional District!

Liz is so grateful for the support and encouragement she has received while traveling across the district. Mainers know that Liz will fight to restore government back to the people, to uphold our Constitution, to fight for our freedoms and for our children's future.

You will be added to our regular campaign updates, so please keep a lookout in there for ways to help out the campaign as we get closer to the primary date!

Want to donate? Visit [www.LizforMaine.com/donate](https://www.lizformaine.com/donate)

Email us at [info@lizformaine.com](mailto:info@lizformaine.com) if you have any questions!

Thanks,
Team Caruso for Congress

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Bernie: "You really can’t win an election with a bumper sticker that says: 'Well, we can’t do much, but the other side is worse.'"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, midterm
election years are notoriously difficult for the party in power in
November. Corporate Democrats in the House and Senate have failed to
deliver for the people — and Bernie is ringing the alarm in Politico.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110440?refcode=em20220612-23815&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=23815%2E1203867%2EsVYCpV ]Politico headline reads Bernie to Dems: Change course before you
nosedive in November

The article says, “Bernie Sanders has something to get off his chest:
Without a course correction, he sees the Democratic Party on track to get
shellacked this fall.”

This is the reality after corporate Democrats failed to pass Biden’s Build
Back Better Act, meaningful investments in the fight against climate
change, real health care policy, guaranteed paid sick and medical
leave...the list goes on.

Our mission at Justice Democrats is to elect progressive fighters to
Congress like Summer Lee, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, and grow
the Squad. Because change will only happen if we have leaders willing to
fight the status quo and prioritize the people over corporate profits.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110440?refcode=em20220612-23815&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=23815%2E1203867%2EsVYCpV ]Can you donate $3 today to help us transform the
Democratic Party? We must elect more working-class fighters for the
people, not just the same corporate Democrats who fail to deliver for the
people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110440?refcode=em20220612-23815&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=23815%2E1203867%2EsVYCpV ]Contribute $3

Bernie also said, “You really can’t win an election with a bumper sticker
that says: 'Well, we can’t do much, but the other side is worse.'”

It’s true! The main argument Democrats are making for November is that the
GOP is worse. The GOP is much worse, but that doesn’t win elections when
you’re the party in power. Democrats in Congress need to deliver material
benefits to people by, at a bare minimum, lowering health care costs,
bolstering the social safety net, empowering workers, canceling student
debt, and fighting climate change.

Without these things, Democrats will likely lose the majority in November.

There was hope when Democrats took the White House and majorities in the
House and Senate for the first time in a decade — hope that leaders in the
party would see the current crises facing so many people in the country,
the crisis facing our planet, and would act. But we’ve seen very little
action, Peter.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110440?refcode=em20220612-23815&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=23815%2E1203867%2EsVYCpV ]Will you stand with Bernie and Justice Democrats right now with a
$3 donation towards upending the corporate-backed status
quo in Congress? We can elect more Justice Democrats to Congress and
continue advocating for the policies we so desperately need.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110440?refcode=em20220612-23815&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=23815%2E1203867%2EsVYCpV ]Contribute

You know we can’t do this alone and you know so much is on the line. Thank
you for fighting alongside us.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220612-23815-footer&t=1025&refcode2=23815_1203867_sVYCpV&akid=23815%2E1203867%2EsVYCpV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=23815%2E1203867%2EsVYCpV

name: John Fetterman
subject: I can’t believe this is happening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
It’s been 10 days since Dr. Oz became our opponent.
#
I can’t believe this is happening, Derek... 🤦
It’s been ten days since quack celebrity TV doctor Dr. Oz became our official opponent.
You know, if you would’ve told me this a few years back — _heck, even a few months back_ — I wouldn’t have believed you. But here we are.
And if we don’t take his campaign (and the Super PACs supporting him) seriously, it could really blow up in our face.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220612-2?refcode=em20220612-6185&refcode2=6185_434096_guT41O&akid=6185%2E434096%2EguT41O)
_Get it?_
**[That’s why I need you to rush a donation of $5 to our campaign right now to help us meet our mid-month goal. We need ALL the online support possible now that Dr. Oz is officially our Republican nominee in the #1 Most Likely to Flip U.S. Senate Seat of 2022.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220612-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220612-6185&refcode2=6185_434096_guT41O&akid=6185%2E434096%2EguT41O)**
There are a lot of BAD things about Dr. Oz. It would literally take me *hours* to go down the whole list. But here is the elevator pitch on why we gotta stop this guy:
He’s a fraudster who made a fortune by lying to people on TV. He’s a self-funded multi-millionaire. He called Roe v. Wade “wrong” + said he supports an extreme ban on abortions with no exceptions for rape or incest. And he isn’t even from PA, he’s from NJ!!!
[**_We’re just 10 days into this election against Dr. Oz, so every dollar you give today will make a huge difference come November. Can you make a $5 contribution (or more if you can swing it) to help us meet our mid-month goal? This race is going to be incredibly expensive, and it’s critical that we keep up with Dr. Oz’s spending._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220612-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220612-6185&refcode2=6185_434096_guT41O&akid=6185%2E434096%2EguT41O)
**[Donate now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220612-2?refcode=em20220612-6185&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6185_434096_guT41O&akid=6185%2E434096%2EguT41O)**
Thank you for everything,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220612-6185-footer&t=1&refcode2=6185_434096_guT41O&akid=6185%2E434096%2EguT41O)**
---

Peter,

Our nation has crises piling up with no solutions due to the far-left’s poor leadership, and hardworking Americans are forced to pay the price.

But we have a chance to put America back on the right path this coming up election, and that starts with [**George Logan**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c1aa12b86c2c43bc94b2491fc16c8802&_e=uPttXte5B5yqBWLJjL0V0Kbm85VdbfBMzeUo1dpLOXY7hvt_G8VZEMF09EAwt5vAXTbPxV1fuAVODoD59iP62gVrzKUb7JrgE7JBeBsW0U-0SOa31Cw-AUpTFQIVVfdiroIemGJIOCoVUPBJVsJeNMC4V1UhRK1LThzQD5Xsxtc16wN12s3hP-lW1xVIXhm3oJegdLuwbPqbyxyGvWblA_3GKpiHJcQRoOq9R4F__Ix-NCD6MHoKzxTVWaqvbsX7Vbd2q4ZuYGoqRKxDb6tgoZnwkfcyfUQy6Tlw3v2u2b9I_R_fNXdIu-tjOpDyEDa9kch0uBW04Hx-UP-ZY2n-kJ_Ti76a3pcnnRjlHr0X1bOLmaJLCxYQEsedoFTIQ_vVOqGSa3fpKoq05w1NVUX7vbql3zq_9YUPdlI2-2FmdQvTKy-A11XWI7QwCxpEJRUX98uOKsEbdbiVHem8dAvluDaXvtD5bEwsmYY5BY2xHFwvRbLCGkxRxNE0D0Vfr5aVz05kJ88J4k6y0ietzNDKEA%3D%3D).

**I am proud to say that George has my complete and total endorsement for Connecticut’s 5th Congressional District.** He is a true leader and will bring the leadership we desperately need in our nation’s Capital.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c1aa12b86c2c43bc94b2491fc16c8802&_e=uPttXte5B5yqBWLJjL0V0Kbm85VdbfBMzeUo1dpLOXY7hvt_G8VZEMF09EAwt5vAXTbPxV1fuAVODoD59iP62gVrzKUb7JrgE7JBeBsW0U-0SOa31Cw-AUpTFQIVVfdiroIemGJIOCoVUPBJVsJeNMC4V1UhRK1LThzQD5Xsxtc16wN12s3hP-lW1xVIXhm3oJegdLuwbPqbyxyGvWblA_3GKpiHJcQRoOq9R4F__Ix-NCD6MHoKzxTVWaqvbsX7Vbd2q4ZuYGoqRKxDb6tgoZnwkfcyfUQy6Tlw3v2u2b9I_R_fNXdIu-tjOpDyEDa9Z6OM5w-f3fP9gfnahedMU9lGIzEV3Z7grRJPFpLPbe4mDeRzgl1fBymf1I7Ri5rnKxGNAlpP8YZsTAPPexbWE4xTJVsJcZLHDN9MGthZf11i2XjkidA42TFlbXaT0CA5LA7i9CIRL4UrtqK0BT5cT9R6lLs4gdng4yP0y27VDTjFIv8mCLYiuPq-SCW2a9Qw_a-_Xpq43mMAwdxlTYzQOA%3D%3D)

| [**HELP GEORGE GET TO CONGRESS ››**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c1aa12b86c2c43bc94b2491fc16c8802&_e=uPttXte5B5yqBWLJjL0V0Kbm85VdbfBMzeUo1dpLOXY7hvt_G8VZEMF09EAwt5vAXTbPxV1fuAVODoD59iP62gVrzKUb7JrgE7JBeBsW0U-0SOa31Cw-AUpTFQIVVfdiroIemGJIOCoVUPBJVsJeNMC4V1UhRK1LThzQD5Xsxtc16wN12s3hP-lW1xVIXhm3oJegdLuwbPqbyxyGvWblA_3GKpiHJcQRoOq9R4F__Ix-NCD6MHoKzxTVWaqvbsX7Vbd2q4ZuYGoqRKxDb6tgoZnwkfcyfUQy6Tlw3v2u2b9I_R_fNXdIu-tjOpDyEDa9EKn-5n4ljaqmJ3ucBirkVXrRarcxEDBH3HZzqLv8tE1hs5Ahlo7D-P9ty3Met4o6tXZN0QwJFXLhit_qAZj2tSHJoQ4Tx3hrc6o84Q0PfBMUY_7ytSpT5VUu1eaW-nWf5r39Ht60LUDI_YkCVEvDJ3XLxMlYhnK_0NpBmA9a03TUOmnqtWFZHeRcmkyAsAcGms5ex8hdXUZWGrS-5Igc2w%3D%3D)
---

Connecticut is now a BATTLEGROUND STATE. Voters are sick and tired of the same failed Democrat leadership. **The people of Connecticut have been overlooked and forgotten about for far too long, and George is ready to change that.**

You see, George’s opponent is Jahana Hayes, a JV ‘squad’ member who is out of touch with constituents. _Her votes align with Pelosi’s 100% and even receives funding from the most radical Democrats like AOC!_

Jahana already has $1.5 million on hand, and her supporters’ pockets run **_deep_**. George really needs the [**help of every grassroots conservative to step up and chip in today**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c1aa12b86c2c43bc94b2491fc16c8802&_e=uPttXte5B5yqBWLJjL0V0Kbm85VdbfBMzeUo1dpLOXY7hvt_G8VZEMF09EAwt5vAXTbPxV1fuAVODoD59iP62gVrzKUb7JrgE7JBeBsW0U-0SOa31Cw-AUpTFQIVVfdiroIemGJIOCoVUPBJVsJeNMC4V1UhRK1LThzQD5Xsxtc16wN12s3hP-lW1xVIXhm3oJegdLuwbPqbyxyGvWblA_3GKpiHJcQRoOq9R4F__Ix-NCD6MHoKzxTVWaqvbsX7Vbd2q4ZuYGoqRKxDb6tgoZnwkfcyfUQy6Tlw3v2u2b9I_R_fNXdIu-tjOpDyEDa9nwp9vAGk8QIAQUZMr8o2hl2OrvjqfPNw5vf9ct1aqFE9sOvRj87igTV6FAjMWqOTq7J0aMNbYqXZTWeqCUHWzZbrG_dFeMEEhifgguDzcOTCq7bDOlSy51c4X1DT5vCys9wQr11w_n2-E59nIZCXuvl_URHchxMtUh2FHC4PEV1QS0o-8nn3bixcEC7ihdHFKRsYZqwouImtCQkinAvUtg%3D%3D) to flip this seat RED (which hasn’t happened in over 10 years)!

[**HELP GEORGE GET TO CONGRESS ››**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c1aa12b86c2c43bc94b2491fc16c8802&_e=uPttXte5B5yqBWLJjL0V0Kbm85VdbfBMzeUo1dpLOXY7hvt_G8VZEMF09EAwt5vAXTbPxV1fuAVODoD59iP62gVrzKUb7JrgE7JBeBsW0U-0SOa31Cw-AUpTFQIVVfdiroIemGJIOCoVUPBJVsJeNMC4V1UhRK1LThzQD5Xsxtc16wN12s3hP-lW1xVIXhm3oJegdLuwbPqbyxyGvWblA_3GKpiHJcQRoOq9R4F__Ix-NCD6MHoKzxTVWaqvbsX7Vbd2q4ZuYGoqRKxDb6tgoZnwkfcyfUQy6Tlw3v2u2b9I_R_fNXdIu-tjOpDyEDa9jjMkU-EqwuT1y4VJkBnqNdTJUKDZfS8qj6h9wj45mYdX5AVJ7gGfSzUZvQrY4bU9pWY5JHMECuwdOMnOvBO0hCsXWew0H7Gsl9n6VBKFPlp7sUjK-iJKkBRq21Rutao_lsyVVJa6OdrEeSNikc-J4RqRS9IdmdyOP9E2YP4KhuD9oxyM_fk1JUevFQOzCkzdEJPyXj3-P_MdcLvQHZXVKA%3D%3D)
---

I know that George is not only qualified but will succeed as a congressman. He cares about his community deeply and has leadership experience from serving two terms as a State Senator.

He is a logical thinker, problem solver, and an active voice who always gives a hand. **He is the leader we need in Congress!** So please, [**whatever you can give today will be not only an investment in George but in our nation’s future.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c1aa12b86c2c43bc94b2491fc16c8802&_e=uPttXte5B5yqBWLJjL0V0Kbm85VdbfBMzeUo1dpLOXY7hvt_G8VZEMF09EAwt5vAXTbPxV1fuAVODoD59iP62gVrzKUb7JrgE7JBeBsW0U-0SOa31Cw-AUpTFQIVVfdiroIemGJIOCoVUPBJVsJeNMC4V1UhRK1LThzQD5Xsxtc16wN12s3hP-lW1xVIXhm3oJegdLuwbPqbyxyGvWblA_3GKpiHJcQRoOq9R4F__Ix-NCD6MHoKzxTVWaqvbsX7Vbd2q4ZuYGoqRKxDb6tgoZnwkfcyfUQy6Tlw3v2u2b9I_R_fNXdIu-tjOpDyEDa9Kly0xvVJ71oyuTq-XVZP9janhp9uXsiq-ugeV8YOexuSHq0GtztIsdCu81qAU_iZvQmg8GcMMlSAcLVflWYbw4XcfT-fiRHQWuhLUpp_nlocnd2lhxIPjN1f6Ycd4panvOtjTrQ_FIN83i4iAVeBr_1nM1_0q7fSXGPlyWlZN0tyHrFY7LJcb36cYupbkJEvVA4Vt7k1pHYPABp4Kg7Zag%3D%3D)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: re: Our June Goal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we’re going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals. . |

---

Friend,

It's been a week since we clinched the second-place slot in the June primary and advanced to the General Election in November.

For all of you that voted for me or donated to me:**thank you.**

There's no rest for politicians though! This weekend we attended the Colusa County Fair from Thursday-Sunday and the Pride Pop-up Event on Saturday morning. They are -- to be succinct -- very different crowds. But they are all Americans and they are all constituents if CD-1.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46446778/350319838/-96927706?refcode=em-6.12.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmEwNTkyMi1iZGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vuGyaUm1N2lz0g4ZEAVU4RFi3nfiaBa0Im6lgcjLaZU=)
_Meeting some voters at the Pride Pop-up._
I started this campaign with the intent of traveling across the district and talking to voters of all stripes. I want to be a "boots on the ground" candidate because, unlike LaMalfa, I want politicians to engage with voters.

**Watching the January 6th hearings reminds me why I'm running AGAINST LaMalfa. Attending events like Pride or the Fair reminds me who I'm running FOR.**

**[As we kick off our general election push, our outreach efforts are going to increase substantially. If you can, send in $3 to keep our campaign to unseat Doug LaMalfa firing on all cylinders.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46446779/350319839/-96927706?refcode=em-6.12.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmEwNTkyMi1iZGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vuGyaUm1N2lz0g4ZEAVU4RFi3nfiaBa0Im6lgcjLaZU=)** | **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46446780/350319840/-96927706?refcode=em-6.12.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmEwNTkyMi1iZGVhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vuGyaUm1N2lz0g4ZEAVU4RFi3nfiaBa0Im6lgcjLaZU=)**

Attending events like Pride or the Fair reminds me who I'm running FOR. = | = Thank you, Max Steiner Combat Veteran and Democrat for Congress | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by = If you'd like to receive less email, add your name We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Max Steiner is a combat veteran of the Iraq War and Sergeant First Class in the Army Reserves. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense. Max Steiner for Congress 2485 Notre Dame Blvd, Ste 370 #194 Chico, CA 95928 United States

name: Giffords.org
subject: We have a DEAL! Add your name to say you support the Senate’s bipartisan gun safety legislation.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
For the first time in nearly 30 years, Congress looks like it has the votes to pass bipartisan legislation that will make our communities safer from gun violence.
#

Friends -
For the first time in nearly 30 years, Congress looks like it has the votes to pass bipartisan legislation that will make our communities safer from gun violence.
We hope it passes quickly, and want to ask you to add your name to ours if you agree:
[**Please sign Giffords’ petition calling on Congress to pass the Senate deal on gun safety. Help us make sure legislators know there is broad support for action.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/senate_deal_petition_em/?source=em220612-2-15&t=1&akid=2134%2E3935704%2Ea_Sifr)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/senate_deal_petition_em/?source=em220612-2-15&t=2&akid=2134%2E3935704%2Ea_Sifr)**
The legislation does a couple of important things:
1\. It establishes a grant-to-states program that will strengthen red flag and extreme risk laws that make sure people who shouldn’t have guns aren’t able to have them.
2\. It establishes an enhanced background checks review process for 18-21 year olds looking to purchase long guns.
3\. Invests in child and family mental health services.
4\. Cracks down on criminals who illegally evade federally licensed firearms dealer requirements.
While this agreement does not include strong gun safety policies like universal background checks, these provisions will save lives.
Let us repeat. This legislation will save lives.
And it is only possible because the ground has shifted dramatically on the issue of gun safety thanks to our collective efforts.
So please, add your name to say you support this bill today:
[**Sign Giffords’ petition calling on Congress to pass the Senate deal on gun safety.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/senate_deal_petition_em/?source=em220612-2-15&t=3&akid=2134%2E3935704%2Ea_Sifr)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/senate_deal_petition_em/?source=em220612-2-15&t=4&akid=2134%2E3935704%2Ea_Sifr)**
Thank you,
The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2134%2E3935704%2Ea_Sifr) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:

---
Two-thirds of Republicans in the 4th Congressional district just voted for a new person to represent us in Congress. In the world of politics, that is a mandate for change. I’m proud to stand with my longtime friend Sheriff Ezell. Mike and I go way back to our days in the D.A. Office. He will represent us well. This is what the Republican Party can be about -- coming together to make things better for our citizens. Please join me in endorsing Mike Ezell for Congress by donating to his campaign.

name: AlessandraBiaggi.com
subject: Humbly asking for your $3 contribution ahead of this month’s official FEC fundraising deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
Everyone is going to be watching
#

Friends — here's the situation:
At the end of this month, we’re facing the _first_ official FEC fundraising deadline since we launched our campaign against Sean Patrick Maloney — **and the _final_ deadline before votes are cast in the August primary.**
When this deadline ends, we’re legally required to report not just how much money we’ve raised, but how many contributions make up that amount, too.
Everyone is going to be watching — our allies, our opponents, the media — across New York and the entire country.
They’re all going to be waiting to see if our people-powered, grassroots campaign has what it takes to win against one of the most well-funded corporate Democrats in Congress.
Our fundraising report will show whether or not we have the resources necessary to take on Sean Patrick Maloney and the establishment’s millions in dark money attack ads that are just around the corner.
**Alessandra can’t do it alone — the only way we’ll be able to do this is together. So we have to ask:**
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign for Congress ahead of this critical FEC fundraising deadline? Anything you can chip in before we’re legally required to report our numbers will show the strength of our movement.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?refcode=em220612-1-t1&refcode2=828_59515_vW3tPF&akid=828%2E59515%2EvW3tPF)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220612-1-t1&refcode2=828.59515.vW3tPF&akid=828%2E59515%2EvW3tPF)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220612-1-t1&refcode2=828.59515.vW3tPF&akid=828%2E59515%2EvW3tPF)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220612-1-t1&refcode2=828.59515.vW3tPF&akid=828%2E59515%2EvW3tPF)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220612-1-t1&refcode2=828.59515.vW3tPF&akid=828%2E59515%2EvW3tPF)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220612-1-t1&refcode2=828.59515.vW3tPF&akid=828%2E59515%2EvW3tPF)**
---
****
| **[Or another amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?express_lane=true&refcode=em220612-1-t1&refcode2=828.59515.vW3tPF&akid=828%2E59515%2EvW3tPF)**
---
****
We’re funding this campaign the right way: no corporate PACs, no nonsense — just people. That’s why your support today is so important.
We need a big month here, so thanks in advance for chipping in if you can.
\- Team Biaggi

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-june/?refcode=em220612-1-t1&refcode2=828.59515.vW3tPF&akid=828%2E59515%2EvW3tPF)**
---

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=828%2E59515%2EvW3tPF).

Dear Friend,

Last week the Inspector General’s report showed that 10 Baltimore City schools changed more than 12,000 failing grades to passing grades amid pressure from school administrator.
This is an absolute tragedy and I am calling for a full-blown independent investigation into the entire school system.

Leadership in the City is either asleep at the wheel or part of the problem. It is shameful that the Baltimore City School System CEO has allowed such nefarious behavior to occur on her watch.
This further erodes the trust that families have in school administrators to do what is right, put kids first, and provide them with the best education and mentorship possible.
I have introduced a Parental Bill of Rights to build upon these actions and further increase accountability and transparency in our schools. We must also empower parents so that they can take their children out of failing schools and place them into schools where they can have every chance at success.
Allowing this public corruption to continue is not an option.
Will you join me?
Thank you,

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, Last week the Inspector General’s report showed that 10 Baltimore City schools changed more than 12,000 failing grades to passing grades amid pressure from school administrator. This is an absolute tragedy and I am calling for a full-blown independent investigation into the entire school system. Leadership in the City is either asleep at the wheel or part of the problem. It is shameful that the Baltimore City School System CEO has allowed such nefarious behavior to occur on her watch. This further erodes the trust that families have in school administrators to do what is right, put kids first, and provide them with the best education and mentorship possible. I have introduced a Parental Bill of Rights to build upon these actions and further increase accountability and transparency in our schools. We must also empower parents so that they can take their children out of failing schools and place them into schools where they can have every chance at success. Allowing this public corruption to continue is not an option. Will you join me? Thank you, Kelly Schulz Candidate for Governor | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

Peter,

This is pathetic - even for the radical Democrats.

The far-Left is TELEVISING their January 6th Committee Hearings for all of America to see. **They’re planning to openly attack anyone** that supported President Trump.

**Only Communist and Authoritarian countries like China and Russia PROSECUTE their political opponents** , and that’s EXACTLY what the socialist Democrats are doing in Washington RIGHT NOW.

Team, It’s been a few months since we last reached out with a survey to ask what issues are most concerning you at the moment, and with less than 6 weeks to election day, we want to hear from you. Wes and Aruna are committed to bringing work, wages, and wealth to Maryland and addressing the issues that matter most to Marylanders, like more affordable and accessible health care, strong public education for every child, a 21st-century transportation system, action on climate change, gun violence prevention, protecting the right to choose, and more. **[This is a campaign by the people of Maryland, for the people of Maryland. So we want to hear from you: what issues matter most to you right now, and what do you hope to see Wes and Aruna fight for as your next Governor and Lt. Governor?
